highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology:

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: Is Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology a good college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology is a well-known institution for B.Voc, B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 4.18 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.98 on Campus Life, 4.34 on Placements, 4.33 on Faculty and 4.03 on Infrastructure.

placements.overview:
Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology was founded in 2008. It is a private institute and is located in Pune, Maharashtra. Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute is approved by AICTE and offers courses in Full Time mode. Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a total of 20 courses in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Animation. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA and B.Voc and the total seat intake for the available courses is 828. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Automobile Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering and Information Technology. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 1,42,580 to 4,31,304 and the average median salary is around . Apart from this, the Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and B.Voc. Whereas, at PG level, Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,42,580 to 4,31,304.

faqs.answer:
A:    Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.VocCandidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent from recognized board.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.

OR

Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognized University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed Bachelor Degree in the relevant field from AICTE or Central or State Government approved institutions or equivalent, with above mentioned marks (at least 45% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and persons with disability belonging to Maharashtra State only).
For sponsored candidates, candidate must have minimum of two years of fulltime work experience in a registered firm/ company/industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best for low and slow course.

review_content.Placements: While I was doing the core, the students placed are 75%, and the highest package was 30 LPA, the lowest is 3.5 LPA, and the average is 5 LPA. The top companies are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Capgemini. The students who got internships are more than 60%, and the role is you can be president of the incubation center.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are decent facilities, and we have got well-organized labs with Wi-Fi. As for the new students. There is a new building going to start from next year, so the new students will get well-prepared classrooms and a good environment for study. I hope they enjoy.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college has decent infrastructure and average faculty members.

review_content.Placements: About 400+ students were placed from my college. The highest package was around 27 Lacs, the lowest was 12 Lacs, and the average was 20 Lacs. Many students from the Computer Science course received internships and job offers. Students from other branches also got placements and internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Libraries are provided. Many types of books are available related to studies. Classrooms are good. Labs are well maintained. Wi-Fi is also available. The hostel facility is also good. The quality of food is average. The canteen is good. The sports room is also there. A medical room is also provided for an emergency.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely the best and most happening college with good placements and well-educated faculty.

review_content.Placements: The placement offered by the college is good enough, as it is co-linked with Pccoe, and all the placements are managed from there itself. There are a lot of companies who are linked with the college like Nice, Google, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available are quite large and good enough. The college has every necessary element required, like labs, ground, library, etc. The college also has a large hostel which is mainly for girls and boys and also has good staff working there. The canteen and hostels are well maintained and clean.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The finest engineering college in Pune.

review_content.Placements: Having good placements for every department. Many companies recruit from our college each year. The highest package is 61 LPA for the mechanical branch. There are many opportunities available.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is also good. The mess is also good, offering a variety of food, and the taste is great. Electricity problems are faced sometimes, but they are not regular. The infrastructure of the hostel is great, and all facilities are available in the hostel.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very knowledgeable. They teach us easy ways to understand the concepts easily. Their question and problem-solving abilities are very good, and they help students very well. They don't make us feel that problems are tough. They teach us very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college campus is really good and silent.

review_content.Placements: Many students get selected by companies like Wipro, Infosys, or any other company. In this branch, the highest package is 12 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. 75 percent of students got placements in companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure in my college for my course. There is a library for students, and it has silence for good study. There are also labs for some other subjects, and they are good. There is also Wi-Fi in the college. There are good medical facilities for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members are very good.

review_content.Placements: For the computer depth, most students without any backlogs get placed. Companies offering a variety of roles come during the pre-final year and final year of college. The salary package offered varies from 8 LPA to 52 LPA. The top recruiters are Nutanix and DE Shaw. Some of the other recruiters are AlgoQuant, Wells Fargo, Deutsche Bank, Citi Bank, Mastercard, and NPCI. Most of the roles are for software developers.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the things like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries are available for our department, but sometimes the Wi-Fi doesn't work. The food in our mess is good, i.e., 8/10. There are also medical facilities available with a big playground. But, it does not look like a playground or a basketball court for outdoor games.

hostel_campus.college_name: Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Institute has a highly furnished in campus hostel facility for the boys and girls coming outside. Each hostel will be carefully and strictly managed by their wardens. Well maintained college canteen is very close to hostels. The food quality is verified by Food committee for NMIET time to time so that students will get good quality food.

library.description:
Library and Information centre of NMIET is well known everywhere for its rich collection of printed and electronic materials (journals, books, video lectures, etc.). The Library is committed to respond to the needs of users by providing well-organized & up-to-date collection. It offers various services to the users. Library has a very Specious Reading Hall with very good infrastructure which is quite comfortable & conducive to reading & learning.
The library is stocked with 12699 numbers of Books and with 3500 titles.Library also have facilities like journals, CDs/DVDs, Book-Bank and Magazines.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis court, Volley ball court, Chess, carom hall

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Digital logic design Lab, Progranmming Lab, Signal Processing Lab, Data structure Lab, Microprocessor Lab, OS Lab, CAD/CAM Lab, Dynamics of Machine Lab, Fluid Mechanics Lab, Heat Transfer Lab, Refrigeration and Air-conditioning Lab, Theory of Machine Lab, Thermodynamics Lab

reviews.review_heading: One of the best for low and slow course.
reviews.review_text: There are decent facilities, and we have got well-organized labs with Wi-Fi. As for the new students. There is a new building going to start from next year, so the new students will get well-prepared classrooms and a good environment for study. I hope they enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: The college has decent infrastructure and average faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Libraries are provided. Many types of books are available related to studies. Classrooms are good. Labs are well maintained. Wi-Fi is also available. The hostel facility is also good. The quality of food is average. The canteen is good. The sports room is also there. A medical room is also provided for an emergency.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best and most happening college with good placements and well-educated faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available are quite large and good enough. The college has every necessary element required, like labs, ground, library, etc. The college also has a large hostel which is mainly for girls and boys and also has good staff working there. The canteen and hostels are well maintained and clean.

reviews.review_heading: The finest engineering college in Pune.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is also good. The mess is also good, offering a variety of food, and the taste is great. Electricity problems are faced sometimes, but they are not regular. The infrastructure of the hostel is great, and all facilities are available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college campus is really good and silent.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure in my college for my course. There is a library for students, and it has silence for good study. There are also labs for some other subjects, and they are good. There is also Wi-Fi in the college. There are good medical facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are very good.
reviews.review_text: All the things like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries are available for our department, but sometimes the Wi-Fi doesn't work. The food in our mess is good, i.e., 8/10. There are also medical facilities available with a big playground. But, it does not look like a playground or a basketball court for outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Basically college is not much important for your placements and your skills are much important.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are well developed. There are many functions for operating every floor. There is a high-speed Wi-Fi connection. Computer lab is also there, and classrooms are well developed with projector. All types of books are available in our library.

reviews.review_heading: Engineering at NMIET is a better option. This provides a good education.
reviews.review_text: The college provides decent infrastructure and facilities. There are labs on each floor, good Wi-Fi connection throughout the college, and digital library is available. I am not a hostel student but my friends say that the hostel facilities are also quite good, also the mess. The canteen is clean and affordable for students. The sports department is big with many indoor and outdoor sports and games in it.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: NMIET has a good infrastructure. The institute also provides students with good labs. The college campus has good Wi-Fi connectivity. The institute also has a good hostel facility. The food quality of the mess is average. The sports room is equipped with good quality sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Very good teaching staff with decent placements. Good infrastructure and huge campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good and our campus is clean. Wi-Fi facility is available. Subject-wise labs are available. We have a huge canteen. Two libraries are available by both A and B wings. Digital projector is available in every classroom. Two different hostels are available for boys and girls with very good and secure facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college is best and worth of fees for the students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at this college is very beautiful. It has 24-hour Wi-Fi, which is great. The security is very good and they have lots of sports and events that are well-played on campus. They also have day events every year that are taken with lots of enthusiasm and effort. The students enjoy these events a lot.

reviews.review_heading: A genuine look at life at NMIET: A Blend of Learning, Growth, and Community.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great and spacious. We have two wings: Wing A for Comp and IT, and the other wing is for ECE and MECH. The college has 3 hostel buildings—2 boys' hostel buildings and 1 girls' hostel building. The hostel has its own mess. The food is good and decent, and the menu depends on the seasonal veggies. The college has a very decent library with all sorts of the latest research papers and books available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nutan Maharashtra Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: We have free wifi on our campus . We have access to the libraries so that we can get the knowledge we want anytime . the canteen in our has affordable food. We have 2 canteens, one for the hostel and one for everyone. The quality of the food is up to the mark . The classrooms have the smart learning tools . The labs provide us a wide range of components or tools for our projects. We can access the components for any project we are working on .

reviews.review_heading: College review of NMIET, Talegaon Dabhade .
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well furnished. They also have projectors and screens. Labs are well furnished as well. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the college, including classrooms, labs, libraries, etc. The quality of food in the hostel is not very good. But overall, the facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has well qualified faculty, good curriculum, campus and education facilities.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi facility available across the hostel and the college campus. In my college, a classroom’s strength is around 60 students which the infrastructure can accommodate easily. The mess and the canteen are pretty good. The food served in the mess is very good.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, candidates looking for course admission at Narsimha Reddy Engineering College either for BTech or MBA, must complete Class 12. review_summary.college_name: Narsimha Reddy Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Our college is not the best, but it is good for self-interested students.

content.Placements: Our college provides placement opportunities. The placement record is good. The average package is 3.5 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. In the college's history, the highest package offered is 25 LPA. Nearly 75% of students get placed every year. Top recruiting companies like TCS and others are associated with our college. As students, we are offered basic entry-level roles.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has poor infrastructure with old buildings and cracks. The essential facilities required for students are up to the mark. Wi-Fi and computers are well maintained. The food in the canteen is rated around 8 out of 10. There are no medical facilities available on campus, but sports are given good priority.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure, good faculty, 100 percent placement.

content.Placements: In our college, the placement percentage is 90 percent. For those who want to get placed in the IT field, our college is great. The top roles and courses offered in our college are CSE, CSE Specialization, ECE, EEE, Civil, and Mechanical
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is great, hostel food is good, and the labs are well-equipped. Wi-Fi is available. Rules and regulations are very strict, and we have to obey all of them. CRT is provided for all branches
content.Faculty: Qualified faculty and friendly staff. Teachers are very helpful, and we can gain good knowledge in subjects as well as good practical knowledge. Here, we have training sessions for CSE, EEE, ECE, and other specialization branches. They provide more practical knowledge for industrial orientation, and our curriculum is R21.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college for engineering.

content.Infrastructure: College offers one of the best infrastructures compared to its competitors, and it is divided into 4 separate blocks, with each block serving a different purpose. admission_overview.college_name: Narsimha Reddy Engineering College Courses 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Fee, Application Process

admission_process.title: Narsimha Reddy Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Narsimha Reddy Engineering College admission enquiry form 2025is currently open. The college offers BTech and MBA courses at the UG and PG level. To get admission toNREC, a common entrance test (EAMCET) is conducted by the State Government. For BTech course admission, 70 % of the seats are allotted based on merit in the EAMCET. A total of 30 % of the seats are earmarked for Management/NRI candidates. In addition to the above, under the BTech Lateral Entry scheme, diploma holders are admitted in the second year of BTech to the extent of 20% of intake based on merit in the ECET.

The college is affiliated withJawarlaahl Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH).Students want to apply for various courses atNarsimha Reddy Engineering College,need to apply online. Read the following article to know more aboutNREC course admission2025.

The admissions to BTech is done through a common entrance test (EAMCET). Further, the college also offers a BTech Lateral Entry course. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularNarsimha Reddy Engineering College courses:
Read more:NREC Brochure
NREC admission process includes registration and should have a valid entrance exam score. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in Narsimha Reddy Engineering College:
STEP 1: NREC Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. Candidates need to pay an application fee.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Students will be selected based on EAMCET + TSICET scores as per respective courses. Candidates must the eligibility criteria as per respective courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is not the best, but it is good for self-interested students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has poor infrastructure with old buildings and cracks. The essential facilities required for students are up to the mark. Wi-Fi and computers are well maintained. The food in the canteen is rated around 8 out of 10. There are no medical facilities available on campus, but sports are given good priority.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, good faculty, 100 percent placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great, hostel food is good, and the labs are well-equipped. Wi-Fi is available. Rules and regulations are very strict, and we have to obey all of them. CRT is provided for all branches

reviews.review_heading: Good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: College offers one of the best infrastructures compared to its competitors, and it is divided into 4 separate blocks, with each block serving a different purpose. It also provides computer lab, and all the practical labs required. There is only a girls hostel and no boys hostel.

reviews.review_heading: A good college to approach engineering.
reviews.review_text: In NRCM College, the infrastructure is good. It has different blocks for different courses, and it provides a computer lab and a canteen. It lacks hostel facilities because it only offers girls' hostel, if it offered boys' hostel also, it would be better.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college has 4 blocks, each with a different purpose and infrastructure. One block has fully functional computers, the complete block has computers, the other block is for freshers, and the other two blocks are for seniors. Our college has only a girls hostel and no boys hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Based on the 4-year fees, I would recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has one of the best infrastructures. It offers 4 different blocks divided for freshers and seniors. Each block has its own specialty. Our college offers only a girls' hostel. It does not have a boys' hostel, which I think is perfect as it improves girls' safety.

reviews.review_heading: Top 20th college in Hyderabad, NRCM.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure, for example, there is a whole separate block for computer labs and faster Wi-Fi speed, spacious classrooms, and the hostels are only for girls. I don't really know what the room looks like, but the food they eat is really good because it is offered by the college canteen, which is available for all the college students.

reviews.review_heading: Please join our college for only studies, not for games or sports.
reviews.review_text: My college has a very good campus, with a beautiful location. The classrooms are customized as per students' wishes, like fans, lights, and windows. The labs are very neatly arranged. In our hostel, the food is very delicious. Must eat that food daily. The medical facilities are also available, and there are sports facilities as well. We have a beautiful and colorful canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2025 and very supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, for example, there is a whole separate block for computer labs, faster Wi-Fi speed, and spacious classrooms. The hostels are only for girls, so I don't really know what the room looks like, but the food they eat is really good because it is offered by the college canteen, which is available for all the college students.

reviews.review_heading: My college is excellent for studying.
reviews.review_text: My college classrooms are big and nice. There is good Wi-Fi available, and it is very speed. Labs have ACs, digital TVs, and screens. My classroom has digital TVs and digital boards. My college hostel is beautiful and nice.

reviews.review_heading: A career-focused course with good campus life and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our facilities include dedicated computer labs with the latest systems and internet for programming data analytics AI/ML and cloud computing smart classrooms with projectors and interactive boards for learning; a central library offering physical books e resources (e journals NPTEL IEEE) and a digital reading zone; and air conditioned seminar halls for workshops and guest lectures. Additionally our hostel facilities provide spacious and clean rooms (2 or 3 sharing) with adequate lighting fans an...

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty and strict exams, but we need more events and infrastructure upgrades.
reviews.review_text: My college campus is very beautiful to see and to enjoy nature. Seeing my college campus ground, it is very green and so beautiful, watching it, our stress and headaches are relieved. Classrooms are good, the college canteen is very big, and we have 2 grounds.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. It offers good packages.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good and Wi-Fi is excellent. Everything is good and the quality of facilities is not so good. The food is not bad. The hostel in college is for only girls and it is constructed in a different building for girls. The mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good collage and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good facilities. There are good labs too.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Narsimha Reddy Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is improving compared to when I started my degree back in 2022. Hostel facility is only available for girls for now. The food and facilities are good and can be better if they improve. The course infrastructure is more better.

review_content.Placements: Good placements are provided by the college. faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced
faqs.question: Q: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Institute of Technology are B.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. review_summary.college_name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Don't take admission in this college .

content.Placements: There are no placements or any help with getting placed. It's a bad experience with this college regarding placements. They bring companies, but those companies ask for fees and offer nothing in return.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by the college are bad. The benches are uncomfortable for writing, and the electricity cuts out during exams, which is very disturbing. Practical and practical exams are not conducted properly. The computers don't work, and they don't conduct any practicals in the lab.
content.Faculty: Not all teachers are helpful. Regarding exams, they don't allow students to take the exam if they haven't paid the full fees, even though they said before admission that fees could be paid in installments. They remove students from exams and don't allow them to take unit tests if fees are not paid, marking them as absent. It's a very bad experience.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Reviewing Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Institute of Technology, Mumbai University.

content.Placements: Good placements are provided by the college. Many named companies visit our college to take the students for their companies by first interviewing them, and based on their performances, decide their posts and packages. The minimum package ranges from 5 to 6 Lacs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: The college hostel services are average because it costs more than we except. As the college is located near the highway, very few students come from long distances to take admission here. So if you are planning to take an admission in this college, you should take the hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty are Very Well and good. Placement chances are low.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is very low, and only a few companies visit for recruitment. Therefore, it is essential to have a good GPA to increase the chances of being hired and sitting for campus placements. So maintaining a good CGPA is good for students to take advantage of campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is above average and looks like old-time hostel rooms. But hostels are okay. However, the mess and canteen food are not tasty and are tasteless. The other canteens of the college are good and serve good food of quality. Bathrooms of our college are also not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I think my college is good enough.

content.Placements: Maximus 90% students where placed in my course For my course mechanical engineering the highest is 12k to 15k Didn't came yet no placement for mechanical still now I have done internship in royal enfield by my own from my college no one getting internship The roll offered in my course is bad because I don't have roles they are only teaching us about book knowledge that's it not teaching skills etc.
content.Infrastructure: We have library and labs and classroom. I don't know about hostel but food is not that good average sport and game are average not too good I was playing football in sports day the quality of food is average medical facilities I don't know about it mess and canteen are closed now and shifted to somewhere else .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A struggle to improve the College

content.Placements: The placement cell is still improving and trying to come up for the benefit of students, soon the quality might increase. Teachers and the principal are very transparent about the placement cell. Their service is see-through for students without any shady activity.
content.Infrastructure: There need some upgrades due to constant light issues. The hostels are pretty lavish, classrooms are kept clean and well-lit, and the library system is the best here. Canteens are pretty great but if you are a non-veg person you might not like it here. Canteens serve pure vegetarian foods. You can bring a non-veg meal and have it in the canteen though.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing B.Tech at IIMT Greater Noida?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, it is worth pursuing BTech at IIMT Group of College as it is one of the renowned colleges in Greater Noida to offer education in the Engineering field. IIMT is approved by AICTE, the Pharmacy Council of India, and the Bar Council of India. The college was established under the aegis of the Association of Management Studies and is accredited by NAAC and NB. Further, the college has a panel of guest lecturers to inspire students in their respective careers and to give them tips and invaluable insights in every course.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BBA at IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida?

Number of seats for BBA and BCA is 240, BJMC is 120 and B.Com is 60. IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida college ranked as top 55 colleges in NIRF Ranking NIRF, Ministry of HRD. Ranked among top 20 emerging B-Schools of India by Chronicle 12th All India B-School Survey 2022 Ranked 10th in Excellence Category and 10th in Northern Region in GHRDC BCA College Survey 2022. Ranked among top 75 colleges in India by Times of India 2020.

overview_faqs.question: Is IIMT Noida good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: IMT Noida was established in 1994 and is approved by AICTE, the Pharmacy Council of India, and the Bar Council of India. IIMT was established under the aegis of the Association of Management Studies and is accredited by NAAC and NBA. Some of the colleges under the IIMT Group of Colleges are affiliated with Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, the Board of Technical Education, Uttar Pradesh, and Chaudhary Charan Singh University. The placements are ongoing for the Class of 2023. Earlier, the the highest and average package offered during IIMT Noida placements 2022 stood at INR 32.05 LPA and INR 4.88 LPA, respectively. Further, 480 recruiters participated in the placement process and selected 1,200 students in various sectors viz., Consulting, BFSI, FMCG, etc. The top recruiters of IIMT Greater Noida in 2022 included Accenture, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, EY, KPMG, PwC, etc.

review_summary.college_name: IIMT Greater Noida Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: All over, good college, good infrastructure and good campus life.

content.Placements: Placement is very good for those students who studied very well, and placement is good. The highest package is 44 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. The percentage of students who placed is 83%. Top recruiters include companies like Paytm, Axis Bank, EY, and all in CSE (AI). The package is high compared to the CSE core.
content.Infrastructure: There is a hostel facility. 24/7 Wi-Fi is available. A gym is available. The quality of food is not very good because it is not nutritious. The canteen meal is overall good, but the prices of canteen food are high, not too high but still high. Sports activities include cricket, badminton, volleyball, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with my college. The facilities are great here.

content.Placements: Placement is very good. They provide placement in the 3 to 5 LPA range normally, but in some other cases, it goes near 10 to 12 LPA. Event management, HR (human resources), event planner, manager, business analytics, and business development roles are offered. The maximum number of students is placed every year.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are great. The infrastructure is really nice. The library is also very good. Canteens are kept neatly. We have two hostels, one for boys and one for girls. We also have 4 canteens which provide a variety of food, including Chinese, continental, South Indian, and beverages.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My raw and uncut review of my college.

content.Placements: Our college usually provides internships in the LL.B. course in local courts or under advocates for a better experience in the field. They try to provide as many students as they can, the rest depend on students' own choice and their skills. The percentage of students who get jobs and internships lies between 80 and 90 percent.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of IIMT is really good and a quite big enough campus we have there. We have spacious classrooms, a different library for each department, and Wi-Fi is also available in each building. Classes are air-conditioned, which is a really good thing, especially in the summer.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best college in India: IIMT Group of Institutes, Greater Noida.

content.Placements: In Information Technology, placement is not very high but still good, around 70-80%. So, it’s a good choice even if you choose B.Tech at IIMT Greater Noida. The education system provided by IIMT Greater Noida group of institutes is professional and focused.
content.Infrastructure: Best features available on campus are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library, where everyone has free access to the Wi-Fi connection. So, it’s the best option available on campus. You also have access to Wi-Fi in your hostel room or can use free internet.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am fully satisfied with the faculty, classrooms, and events organised by the college.

content.Placements: I am 1st year B.Tech CSE AI student. I have seen my seniors who passed out this year, and they get an average package that ranges from 6-7 LPA. Many students get a package of more than 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Accenture, Amazon, Just Dial, Toppr, and Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: There is a separate building for each branch and course. Wi-Fi is good in speed. Each class contains projectors and a smart board for students. Labs are fully furnished. The PPS lab is fully air-conditioned, and the electrical and electronic labs have all the equipment for experiments. The mechanical lab is very big and contains all the equipment. The food quality of the hostel is quite satisfactory, and not too bad. The medical room is available with a doctor. An ambulance is also available in case of an emergency.

admission_process.title: IIMT Greater Noida Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IIMT Group of Colleges admission 2025is currently open. The college offers courses, such as BTech, BSc, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG levels. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers diploma courses. To get admission to the IIMT Group of Colleges, candidates must have a valid entrance exam score, such as JEE Main, JEECUP etc., as per the respective course. The university offers more than 25 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Law, Science etc. The college is also affiliated withAKTUandCCS University Meerut, Read the following article to know more aboutIIMT Greater Noida course admission2025.

The mode of study at IIMT Greater Noida is full-time. To enrol for various course admissions at IIMT Noida, candidates must complete the last educational qualification as per the respective course for the selection process. Read on to know more aboutIIMT College, Greater Noida,course admissions2025.

IIMT Noida courses' admissions are based on the entrance exam/ merit-based. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularIIMT College, Greater Noida courses:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Class 12 in Science stream with 45% aggregate inPhysics, Chemistry & Maths.
Class 12 with an aggregate of 45% aggregate
Merit-based
Bachelor’s degree from a recognised university with 50% aggregate

IIMT Group of Colleges admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to thCollegeseir preferred course. The admission process at IIMT Group of Collegesy is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: IIMT Group of Collegesy Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website (https://www.iimtindia.net) for admission to the various programme. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The university considers various entrance exam scores such as JEE Main, GPAT, CUET etc for admission to the BPharma, MPharma, MBA among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release ofIIMT Group of Collegesy cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theIIMT Group of Colleges feeto confirm their seats in the university
Check out more on IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida admission process in the below video:

faqs.question: Can I get into IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida without CAT?
faqs.answer: IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida offers a large diversity of courses to students in Management field. IIMT Greater Noida admissions are held on the basis of entrance tests. Students seeking course admissions must clear their previous qualifying examination and appear for any of the prescribed entrance exams such as MAT, CAT, CUET, CUET-PG, JEE Main, among others. Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.

faqs.question: Is IIMT Greater Noida admission open?
faqs.answer: Yes, IIMT Greater Noida admission is open. Students need to apply through the official website. The college offers courses, such as BTech, BSc, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers Diploma courses. To get admission to the IIMT Group of Colleges, candidates must have a valid entrance exam score such as JEE Main, JEECUP etc., as per respective course.

faqs.question: What is the academic calendar routine for BSc at IIMT Greater Noida?
faqs.answer: Classes for BSc academic semester usually started from September and it ends in February, the complete breakdown of academic (semester I) calendar for BSc (CS) course is mentioned below in table:MonthsAcademic Year ActivitySeptemberBeginning of Classes for semester INovemberSeasonal Exams for semester IDecemberPTM from semester IJanuarySeasonal II exams for semester IFebruarySemester exam for odd semesters

placement_data.title: IIMT Greater Noida Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: IIMT Greater Noida has a Placement Cell that provides active support to the students in getting quality summer training as well as final placements. The placement process at IIMT Greater Noida includes a comprehensive pre-placement training and skill development program for the students. The final placements at IIMT Greater Noida are a result of very systematic interaction with the industry and continuous career counselling of the students.

IIMT Greater Noida has concluded the placements for the Class of 2025. As per the latest report, the highest package offered during IIMT Greater Noida placements 2025 stood at INR 1.8 Crore per annum. This package was offered by Sale Force. The second-highest package offered stood at INR 80 LP A. The top recruiters of IIMT Greater Noida in 2025 included Sales Force, Ansys, Classplus, TCS, HCL Technology, Nagarro, LTI Mindtree, etc.

faqs: What is BTech cutoff for IIMT Greater Noida?
What is the cutoff for IIMT Greater Noida for BTech under Home State Quota?
description: IIMT Greater Noida cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about IIMT Greater Noida UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:
A few more updates are given below:

The IIMT Greater Noida cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the IIMT Greater Noida BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 879788 and 1389632 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Information Technology. The first round cutoff rank for

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Information Technology was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 879788 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 646425 in 2023 and 615329 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Information Technology demonstrated an improving trend.

IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to IIMT Greater Noida can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

IIMT Greater Noida JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida.

As the IIMT Greater Noida UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at IIMT Greater Noida.
During last round B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) proved to be the toughest for this category, with the closing cutoff being .
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence), followed by B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, and B.Tech. in Information Technology, with the closing ranks of , and , respectively.

For admission to IIMT Greater Noida for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute. Students can see the table below to know the important dates for admission to IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida.

Students who want to know the UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for various rounds can refer to the table below. Candidates also have the option to view the cutoff data for the previous two years, i.e., 2024 and 2023. These cutoff lists can also be downloaded for later use.

IIMT Greater Noida UPTAC cut off 2023 for BTech was concluded after Round 6 of the Seat Allotment Result. According to the IIMT Greater Noida BTech cut off 2023, the Round 1 and the Last Round closing ranks for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 599631 and 909042, respectively for the General All India category students. This also confirmed that B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering at IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida is the most competitive specialisation this year.

hostel_campus.college_name: IIMT Greater Noida Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The Institute has 4 hostels available for boys and girls separately with more than 800 rooms in total having the capacity of 1600 students on a twin-sharing basis. Other facilities include dining halls, indoor games, exercising equipments, communication center with internet facility and sports fields for outdoor games.

library.description: A well -stocked library with approx. 2,00,000 publications of various journals, magazines, and books related to the subjects of engineering, law, management, pharmacy, journalism, and mass communication. It subscribes to more than 500 national and international journals and is a member of DELNET, EDUSET, and INDEST. 24x7 Library facility is provided.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Volley Ball Court, Table Tennis Room, Pool Table, Kabaddi, Kho-Kho, Chess

library.description: A well -stocked library with approx. 2,00,000 publications of various journals, magazines, and books related to the subjects of engineering, law, management, pharmacy, journalism, and mass communication. It subscribes to more than 500 national and international journals and is a member of DELNET, EDUSET, and INDEST. 24x7 Library facility is provided.

cafeteria.description: The Institute has 6 active cafeterias for both students and the faculty members are provided food and snacks at subsidized rates. All the cafes on the campus serve quality food and maintain the highest level of hygiene.

hostel.description: The Institute has 4 hostels available for boys and girls separately with more than 800 rooms in total having the capacity of 1600 students on a twin-sharing basis. Other facilities include dining halls, indoor games, exercising equipments, communication center with internet facility and sports fields for outdoor games.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Volley Ball Court, Table Tennis Room, Pool Table, Kabaddi, Kho-Kho, Chess

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Robotics Lab, Pharmacy Lab, Journalism Lab, Antenna & Wave Propagation Lab, Logic Design Lab

reviews.review_heading: All over, good college, good infrastructure and good campus life.
reviews.review_text: There is a hostel facility. 24/7 Wi-Fi is available. A gym is available. The quality of food is not very good because it is not nutritious. The canteen meal is overall good, but the prices of canteen food are high, not too high but still high. Sports activities include cricket, badminton, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with my college. The facilities are great here.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are great. The infrastructure is really nice. The library is also very good. Canteens are kept neatly. We have two hostels, one for boys and one for girls. We also have 4 canteens which provide a variety of food, including Chinese, continental, South Indian, and beverages.

reviews.review_heading: My raw and uncut review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of IIMT is really good and a quite big enough campus we have there. We have spacious classrooms, a different library for each department, and Wi-Fi is also available in each building. Classes are air-conditioned, which is a really good thing, especially in the summer.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in India: IIMT Group of Institutes, Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: Best features available on campus are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library, where everyone has free access to the Wi-Fi connection. So, it’s the best option available on campus. You also have access to Wi-Fi in your hostel room or can use free internet.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with the faculty, classrooms, and events organised by the college.
reviews.review_text: There is a separate building for each branch and course. Wi-Fi is good in speed. Each class contains projectors and a smart board for students. Labs are fully furnished. The PPS lab is fully air-conditioned, and the electrical and electronic labs have all the equipment for experiments. The mechanical lab is very big and contains all the equipment. The food quality of the hostel is quite satisfactory, and not too bad. The medical room is available with a doctor. An ambulance is also available in ...

reviews.review_heading: IIMT College is the best college, but there is only one issue with placement.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is excellent. The college is well-facilitated. There are many facilities for students, such as a library, canteen, and free internet throughout the campus. Every classroom has digital boards. Washrooms are clean, and the staff is helpful. There are many more facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of helpful faculty members, good placements, and great college campus.
reviews.review_text: College campus has free Wi-Fi facilities for all the students. There are air-conditioned labs and libraries making it comfortable for students to study. College campus is quite big with a lot of greenery and with garden. There are also many sports grounds on college campus for sports like cricket, basketball, and kho-kho.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure at IIMT College of Engineering include academic facilities like well-equipped classrooms, modern labs, a robust Wi-Fi-enabled campus, and a library with over 2,00,000 books and journals. We have separate hostels for boys and girls with air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms. It provides a hygienic environment and essential amenities. Mess and canteen offer decent and nutritious meals with a variety of options. Sports facilities include indoor and outdoor game...

reviews.review_heading: I am disappointed due to the lack of good placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the college is good with decent classrooms, proper seating arrangements and a good Wi-Fi facility across the campus. The library is well-maintained and offers a variety of books. Yet, the labs need some improvement as some equipment is outdated or not functioning properly. The hostel facilities are average, and the food in the mess is manageable but could be improved in both quality and variety. Sports facilities are available but limited.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good but students need to work on themselves
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. Wi-Fi is only available in the library, not in classrooms. The quality of food is also not satisfactory. The hostel is comparable to those at other colleges, but there are issues with Wi-Fi connectivity. Medical facilities are inadequate, and the sports facilities are the worst I have ever seen.

reviews.review_heading: The college focuses on the student's skills and education.
reviews.review_text: Facilites in hostels are personal lockers for storming your belongings, shared common areas, bathroom and showers, free Wi-Fi, access to washing machines, locally sourced meals (breakfast, lunch, and dinner ), and oragnise social events such as trips or social nights. Hostels are the best services providing hostels. The food is also delicious, and the wardens take care of students like their own kids.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and the infrastructure is nice.
reviews.review_text: Classroom infrastructure is good. There are labs in all the departments and classrooms are also good with smart board facilities. There is also a library in which we can issue the books and all the departments have Wi-Fi also. The food quality of the mess is good, and all the facilities are good at the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with my college faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a lot of facilities like better cafeteria canteens, and neat and clean classrooms, and the infrastructure of our college is the best. I am happy to take admission here; the infrastructure is so big. Our college provides us with library facilities, Wi-Fi, and labs. They teach us Tally and Excel.

reviews.review_heading: IIMT steps further into the future.
reviews.review_text: The course infrastructure is quite good, but I would not recommend the college hostel. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The hostel has facilities, but they are not up to the expected standards. The food is sometimes hygienic and may not suit the tastes of many. I recommend renting a room or opting for a PG nearby, as there are several options available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. It has good Wi-Fi, a good library, and good classrooms. Everything is good. I think the mess food is bad. I do not stay at the hostel. Medical facilities are average. Labs are good, and the computer lab is also good. The transportation facility is good.

highlights.summary:
JECRC University Admissions Open

The CLAT PG 2026 third merit list is out for JECRC University admission to the PG-level LLM programme. The fourth merit list will be out on May 2, 2026 (10 PM).

table.details: Jaipur Engineering College and Research Centre

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes of JECRC University are its BTech, MTech and MBA courses being well sought-out among students for their flexibility when it comes to specialisations as well as the placement opportunities and career growth after graduation.
The JECRC University BTech covers 21+ specialisations with the programme having a focus on skill development and hands-on learning in a variety of technology focused disciplines.
While the JECRC University MBA imparts management techniques covering topics such as Business Analysis, HR, Finance, etc.
Also, the JECRC University MTech allows students to specialise deeper in their chosen field and serves as a fast-track for students who are more suited for research-oriented or wish to undertake more advanced roles whether it be conducting research or developing new tools and products.
Apart from this, the JECRC University Vidhani also features a range of courses offered in distance mode of education through its Directorate of Distance Education. The courses are given in different specialisations, and students can open the university page to learn more about course-specific specialisations. Interested students can check the other popular programmes of JECRC University in this space:

Many students started their own start-ups

reviews_list.review_title: JECRC University really has great infrastructure, and its main factor is the events it conducts.

review_content.Placements: Placements in JECRC University are around 90 percent. The highest package was 32 LPA in 2025, the lowest was 2-3 Lakhs, and the average package was 6.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Deloitte, Microsoft, etc. Top roles offered were Data Scientists and software developers (both backend and frontend).
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of JECRC University is way better than other competing universities in Jaipur. Classrooms are fully furnished with power sockets inbuilt in each bench, Wi-Fi, AC installed in labs, and a dispensary for any medical emergency. The quality of food available in the hostel is not that good. The canteen has several outlets which have great taste, such as Domino's, etc. JECRC University has great sports infrastructure, from courts of individual to team sports to equipment.

Tech, around 1000 students are placed from JECRC University, and around 75 percent of students from B. Tech got placement. The highest package is 50 LPA, the average is 6 to 7 LPA, and the lowest package is around 3.5–4 LPA. course_faqs.question: How is the dissertation in JECRC University MBA?
course_faqs.answer: In the fourth semester, students need to take a specific research project to understand concepts of subject that have been opted in the programme elective. Students are expected to understand emerging market trends and finding solutions to business problems through proper research process. After successfully completing the project, submit the report to the department. After this, they need to undergo Viva-voce before external and internal subject experts to acquire degree in Management.

course_faqs.question: What is the hostel fee for JECRC University MBA students?
course_faqs.answer: Hostel fee ranges between INR 1.27 lpa to INR 1.72 lpa. There are three room categories in the hostel, including:AC roomNon-AC three-seated room andNon-AC four-seated roomEach room has a different per annum fee. Hostel fee will be paid in two instalments. Do remember that the hostel will be allotted for only two-years. Students need to pay a one-time registration fee of INR 5,000.

course_faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria to get a scholarship for MBA programme at JECRC University?
course_faqs.answer: Some of the scholarships offered by JECRC University to its UG and PG programmes:1. Merit based scholarships2. CAT percentile based scholarships: Students with CAT percentile between 40 to 59.99 gets 15 percent scholarship on tuition fees. Students with a CAT percentile of 60 and above can get 20% scholarship on tuition fees.3. Need based scholarships: This scholarship is offered to students from financially weak backgrounds.

review_summary.college_name: JECRC University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College life is good, however, the placements are not too good.

content.Placements: 10% classmates were placed in office companies, and the rest of them are jobless, doing jobs in BPOs and other fields like sales and marketing. So all average, the placements were not good. I also got my first interview cleared in a sales role, however, they don’t allow us to sit in other internships as one is cleared.
content.Infrastructure: The classroom and infrastructure were good. Labs and libraries were also fine. The canteen was good as well. Sports facilities were good. Medical facilities were also fine, everything was fine.
content.Faculty: Examinations were also average. Courses were not provided by the college. semester wise examining were not so hard, however, you will have to study by yourself, as the study material, like books and copies, was not included in the fees and not provided by the college, so be prepared.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college because it gives you an amazing college life.

content.Placements: I am a fresher, but as I see my seniors, in comparison to the rest of the colleges, it is far better. The placement statistics are for the batch of 2026. The highest package is INR 33-52 LPA. Average package is INR 6.67-6.8 LPA. As we see, college with this type of college life is crazy.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel food is average, but rooms are amazing, you get a private room even in a 3-sharing room, as the hostel is like a 3 BHK flat. You have a common room and a common bathroom, and you have full privacy. There are some strict rules in the hostel that are strictly followed. The labs are also well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: JECRC University really has great infrastructure, and its main factor is the events it conducts.

content.Placements: Placements in JECRC University are around 90 percent. The highest package was 32 LPA in 2025, the lowest was 2-3 Lakhs, and the average package was 6.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Deloitte, Microsoft, etc. Top roles offered were Data Scientists and software developers (both backend and frontend).
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of JECRC University is way better than other competing universities in Jaipur. Classrooms are fully furnished with power sockets inbuilt in each bench, Wi-Fi, AC installed in labs, and a dispensary for any medical emergency. The quality of food available in the hostel is not that good. The canteen has several outlets which have great taste, such as Domino's, etc. JECRC University has great sports infrastructure, from courts of individual to team sports to equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is overall good, just I feel the campus is not so good like others.

content.Placements: I have started my B. Tech in 2024, and at that time the total placements from JECRC University and JECRC Foundation are around 2000 placements. In B. Tech, around 1000 students are placed from JECRC University, and around 75 percent of students from B. Tech got placement. The highest package is 50 LPA, the average is 6 to 7 LPA, and the lowest package is around 3.5–4 LPA. There are top recruiting companies like Amazon, Microsoft, TCS, Accenture, Infosys, Capgemini, Wipro, and the roles offered are software developer, software engineer, data scientist, data science analyst, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: JECRC files pros and cons.

content.Placements: The percentage of students is 40 to 50 percent who are placed. This year, the highest is, I guess, 33 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HPE and Meta. For internships, the ratio is again low, it's 45 to 50 percent. The top role offered is an employee.
content.Infrastructure: I like the infrastructure, it's unique, and you'll definitely feel a friendly environment here. The mess food is good, and the classrooms are also good, kind of like a school vibe, but okay. Wi-Fi works fine, but they can still work on it. Sports facilities are quite good. We have volleyball football, cricket, basketball, tennis, badminton, and pickleball courts.

admission_overview.title: JECRC University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: The university offers more than 25 programmes across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Commerce, Computer Applications, etc. The university offers courses either is offline or distance-education mode. The university offers Offline , full time courses along with Distance education too. Applications for the same are accepted strictly online. The courses offered at UG, PG,PhD, Diploma and Certficate. Read on to know more about Admission process, Application process, Fees, Course eligibility criteria etc for JECRC University.

eligibility_selection.title: JECRC University Eligibility and Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: The university considers entrance exam or qualifying exam scores of the candidates for admission. The university accepts entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, CUET-UG, JEE Main, etc. for admission to specific courses. Aspirants must also fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for admission. Below are popular JECRC University courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria: Bachelor's degree of three-years from a recognised university with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Rajasthan state OBC Non-creamy layer / women category)

faqs.answer: JECRC University admission is both merit and entrance-based. The university offers BTech, BBA, BSc (Hons), etc. at the UG level. The duration of UG courses range from three to five years. Candidates who have passed Class 12 are eligible to apply for UG courses. The university offers MTech, MBA, MSc (Hons), etc. at the PG level. The duration of PG courses is two years. Candidates who have passed graduation are eligible to apply for PG courses. The mode of application is online for all courses.
faqs.question: How can I apply for JECRC University?

faqs.answer: Total intakes of seats in BTech at JECRC University are 550. The intakes are also based on the performance of candidates in the final qualifying exam. The seat intake varies considering multiple parameters. However, the seat intakes mentioned above are taken from the official website. It is still subject to change and, hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: How many BTech seats are available at JECRC University?

faqs.answer: The NTA has released the exam dates for the JEE Main 2026 Session 2. Paper 1 (BE/ BTech) will be administered between April 2, 2026 to April 9, 2026. The Session 2 registration will open in the last week of January. The applicants are requested to fill the application form available on the website jeemain.nta.nic.in.

faqs.answer: To study MBA from JECRC University students must meet the eligibility of having passed with 60% marks in their UG degree with students who have valid scores from CAT/MAT/XAT of the current session being preferred. The Group Discussion and Personal Interview rounds also decided admissions to JECRC University.

admission_process.title: JECRC University Admissions Process 2026

paragraphs: JECRC University admission 2026is bothmerit-basedandentrance-based. JECRC University course admission offersmore than 25 coursesat theUG, PG, PhD,PG Diploma, and Certificate programme level through11 schoolsexcluding the Directorate of Executive Education and PhD. The university also offers distance education through theDirectorate of Distance Education. Besides this,JECRC Universityoffers a range of professionalcertificates and diplomacourses through JECRC online.

JECRC admission procedurestarts with filling out an application form for the desired course by applicants. To apply for admission, candidates must ensure that they are meeting the admission requirements set by the university. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university;
Step 1: JECRC University Application Process 2026

The mode of application is online. Candidates must fill out the application form on the university's website. Aspirants applying for a UG or a PG programme need to pay an application fee ofINR 850. The application fee for PhD programmes isINR 1,500.
Step 2: Selection

The university selects candidates for admission to most of the courses based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. JECRC University also considers scores CUET-UG and CUET-PG scores for some of the UG and PG programmes, respectively. The university also accepts JEE Main, CAT, MAT, etc. for admission to specific courses. Aspirants also need to further pass a personal interview round for courses such as BAJMC, Integrated Law, BA (Hons), etc.
Step 3: Final Admission
Selected candidates need to report at the campus for document verification. Further, aspirants need to pay theJECRC University feeto confirm their seat.
Check out more details in the video below:

The university offers BTech in various specialisations such asComputer Science,Civil, Mechanical, Electronics & Communication, CSE Artificial Intelligence & Data Science,CSE Cyber Security, etc. at the UG level. The university prefers candidates with a valid score in JEE Main. Aspirants with a CUET-UG score can also apply for admission.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria of BTech at JECRC University?
faqs.answer: JECRC University selects candidates for admission to BTech programme based on entrance exam scores. The university prefers aspirants with a valid JEE Main score for admission. Candidates with a CUET-UG score can also apply for BTech. Besides, candidates must also fulfil the eligibility requirements to get a seat in the BTech course of JECRC University. Once the selection process is over, aspirants can confirm their seat by paying the course fee.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at JECRC University?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have passed Class 12 with a minimum of 60% aggregate in all subjects with pass in English, Physics andMathematicsand one subject out of Chemistry, Biology, Biotechnology and Technical vocational subject are eligible to apply for JECRC University BTech programme. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at JECRC University?
faqs.answer: JECRC University offers BTech for four-years at the UG level. The programme is spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech to candidates who have completed Class 12 in relevant subjects. Below are some of the BTech specialisations offered at JECRC University:Computer Science EngineeringCivil EngineeringMechanical EngineeringElectronics & Communication EngineeringCSE Artificial Intelligence & Data ScienceCSE Cyber Security, etc.

faqs.question: What to do after the declaration of CUET result?
faqs.answer: The final CUET answer key published by the NTA serves as the basis for the CUET result. Following this, it is anticipated that all of the participating universities will publish their separate cut-off lists (admission/merit lists) and dates for student acceptance to various UG programs.Candidates must now complete the application in order to be admitted to the college they choose during the application process. Depending on the number of open seats, the college will release a separate cutoff and

courses_data.name: JECRC University BBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: JECRC University offers a three-year BBA programme divided into six semesters. The university offers BBA,BBA in Banking Financial Services & Insuranceand BBA with industry specialisations. Candidates who have completed Class 12 examination from CBSE or equivalent with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Rajasthan state OBC Non-creamy layer/ women category) can apply for the BBA course at JECRC University. The selection for BBA is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam or CUET-UG scores.

faqs.question: What is the admission process at JECRC University?
faqs.answer: The admission process at JECRC University consists of both national-level entrances and institute-level selection rounds for the MBA, BTech, BA LLB, BBA LLB and M.Tech courses while others depend on merit as well as Personal Interview and Group Interview rounds conducted by the institute for admissions at JECRC Jaipur.

faqs.question: Is getting into JECRC University tough?
faqs.answer: It is difficult to say whether getting into JECRC University is tough or easy and will depend on the:Candidate's level of preparationCompetitionAvailable seatsPersonal motivationAs well as a number of other factors that will not be discussed here. But admissions to the different courses at the university will depend on entrance exam scores such asCUET, CAT, MAT,XAT, JEE Main, etc. for its different courses.

courses_data.name: JECRC University MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: JECRC University offers a two-year MBA programme divided into four semesters. The university offers MBA in Dual Specialisation and with industry specialisations. Admission to the MBA programme is based on CAT, MAT or XAT scores. Selected candidates are further called for a group discussion and personal interview round for final selection. The course fee for the MBA programme isINR 3 lakh,or INR 75,000 per semester.

faqs.question: What is the course fees of JECRC University MBA?
faqs.answer: The total annual fee for JECRC University MBA ranges betweenINR 2.50 lakhandINR 2.75 lakh. Aspirants also need to pay INR 10,000 as admission & alumni one-time non-refundable fee. Candidates need to pay the first installment, alumni and admission fee for seat confirmation.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for the MBA course offered at JECRC University?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have passed a bachelor's degree of three-years from a recognised university with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Rajasthan state OBC Non-creamy layer / women category) can apply for JECRC University MBA programme. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: What are the entrance exams accepted by JECRC for the MBA programme?
faqs.answer: JECRC follows a two-year MBA programme at the PG level. Candidates are required to follow the admission process set by JECRC and admit the candidates on the basis of their perfromance in entrance exams such as CAT/MAT/XAT candidates are required to appear for these national level management exams in order to participate in the admission process.
