faqs.question: Can I join JECRC University without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Students can get admission to courses such as BA (Hons), BCom, BCA, MCA, etc. without any entrance exam scores. Such aspirants are shortlisted based on their merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by JECRC University?
faqs.answer: JECRC University accepts multiple national-level entrance exams, such as CUET-UG, CUET-PG, JEE Main, CAT, MAT, XAT, etc., for admission to specific programmes. JECRC University also offers admission to courses based on the merit of the applicants in the last qualifying exam. The university considers CUET-UG for most of the UG courses, such as BTech, BBA, BCA, BCom, BDes, etc. Aspirants also need to pass a personal interview round for admission to a few courses.

faqs.question: Is CUET exam registration open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Common University Entrance Test (CUET) 2026 registration commenced at cuet.nta.nic.in. NTA released the CUET 2026 notification on January 03 and reopened the window on February 23. Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, theCUET registration 2026process commenced online at the official website. Candidates willing to appear for the CUET 2026 exam must have completed complete the application form online. Additionally, before filling application form, candidates must make sure that they have fulfilled the prescribedCUET eligibility criteriato qualify for the entrance exam.

placement_report.college_name: JECRC University Placements 2026: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: JECRC University Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: JECRC University has started the placements for the Class of 2026. In the first 100 days of placement process, 80 companies visited the campus and placed students with good packages. The overall highest package offered during JECRC University placements 2026 stood at INR 33 LPA , whereas the average package offered to the batch 2026 stood at INR 6.67 LPA . The participating recruiters have made 1030 offers so far to the overall Class of 2026. The top recruiters of JECRC University in 2026 include HP, Deloitte, Wipro, Capgemini, Hashira, L&T, Nestle, Dabur, Decathlon, Zomato, etc.

According to the JECRC University NIRF Report 2025, the students of the MBA batch 2024 secured the median salary of INR 4.75 LPA . 246 students of the MBA batch 2024 were placed out of the total 248 graduated students.

hostel_campus.college_name: JECRC University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel of the university has an on-campus residential facility for students has been very thoughtfully designed and planned. An apartment style -three private, single occupancy rooms open into a common living room equipped with a television set, internet access and a pantry making it a completely independent unit. The hostels are air-conditioned/ Nonair-conditioned, comfortable and conducive for the students to have a productive campus life, providing a perfect setting for academic pursuits.

library.description: The library of the university has a good collection of reference and textbooks and journals of national and international repute is available for the students. The library subscribes to both national and regional newspapers and magazines and journals for the benefit of students and general readers. The library, in addition to the textbook, caters for general reading and has a special section for books and journals for competitive examinations. The students have access to the online e-learning portal for integrated learning including NPTEL.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Volley ball Court, Table Tennis, Jacuzzi and spa, Billiards

reviews.review_heading: College life is good, however, the placements are not too good.
reviews.review_text: The classroom and infrastructure were good. Labs and libraries were also fine. The canteen was good as well. Sports facilities were good. Medical facilities were also fine, everything was fine.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college because it gives you an amazing college life.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is average, but rooms are amazing, you get a private room even in a 3-sharing room, as the hostel is like a 3 BHK flat. You have a common room and a common bathroom, and you have full privacy. There are some strict rules in the hostel that are strictly followed. The labs are also well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: JECRC University really has great infrastructure, and its main factor is the events it conducts.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of JECRC University is way better than other competing universities in Jaipur. Classrooms are fully furnished with power sockets inbuilt in each bench, Wi-Fi, AC installed in labs, and a dispensary for any medical emergency. The quality of food available in the hostel is not that good. The canteen has several outlets which have great taste, such as Domino's, etc. JECRC University has great sports infrastructure, from courts of individual to team sports to equipment.

reviews.review_heading: The college is overall good, just I feel the campus is not so good like others.
reviews.review_text: I am pursuing M.A. B. Tech in Computer Science. There are lots of well-working computer labs with decent Wi-Fi facilities for practice in university, clean and spacious classrooms for theory classes, multiple halls and auditoriums for seminars, and a silent library for studies with access to computers in the library. The hostel is well-structured. The best part about the hostel is that it has personal rooms, a good and proper attendance system, and a gym included in the boys’ hostel. The mess is...

reviews.review_heading: JECRC files pros and cons.
reviews.review_text: I like the infrastructure, it's unique, and you'll definitely feel a friendly environment here. The mess food is good, and the classrooms are also good, kind of like a school vibe, but okay. Wi-Fi works fine, but they can still work on it. Sports facilities are quite good. We have volleyball football, cricket, basketball, tennis, badminton, and pickleball courts.

reviews.review_heading: College is good if you are considering a good campus life with decent placements and a good crowd.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, with good classes and all the available facilities one can look for. There is also a very big and recently opened canteen that has a lot of big fast food brands inside with good seating space. The hostels are also good with triple-sharing rooms.

reviews.review_heading: University life of a student.
reviews.review_text: Labs are air-conditioned, and proper PCs are available for each student. There are two main libraries for books, and students can borrow any book for a 15-day period and then have to return it, otherwise, a fine is to be paid. There's a cafeteria with various outlets that have recently opened, where students can sit and enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements and faculty, with a good environment and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The campus was very large and far from the main city of Hyderabad, with bad transport facilities to the college. College hostels were messy, and the food was not good. Sports facilities were good. Wi-Fi was present but could not be accessed. Labs and classrooms were good.

reviews.review_heading: My overall experience is quite good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, but the speed is average and usable. There are labs for every specific subject. It has well-furnished classrooms. The library has a lot of books. Faculty members in the hostel are quite nice and help with every problem we face. Food is also good because it is managed by the Stanza Living company. Medical facilities are available for 24 hours. Sports facilities are really good. We have grounds and courts for every game.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Rajasthan and one of the best colleges in India. It is worth the money.
reviews.review_text: The department has high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and access to a central library with good technical resources. Labs are updated regularly. The overall infrastructure is modern and student-friendly. The hostel is decent with clean rooms,  24x7 security, and regular housekeeping. The food quality and canteen are good and hygienic, with multiple food options. The campus has good medical facilities and a health centre. It has a good sports ground for cricket, foot...

reviews.review_heading: Everything works only if you hustle.
reviews.review_text: Fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus with decent internet speed. Classrooms are good. A library with books specially for law students. Mess food is better than average and managed by a hotel management company called Stanza Living, and it also has a cafeteria. 24/7 medical support with ambulance and dispensary. For sports, it has a football ground, cricket ground, tennis court, volleyball court, basketball court and football turf.

reviews.review_heading: The worst placement in private universities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, in fact hostels are also very good and environment of hostel is also very neat and clean. But the main problem is Wi-Fi. Like in classes you will definitely get the network issue and the faculty doesn't provide you the password of the floor Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Great college with good facilities and amazing events.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well maintained with smart boards and benches with electric circuit with free Wi-Fi throughout the college. Every subject has its dedicated lab like Physics Chemistry and Computer programming. There are around 2 fully functioning libraries with proper facilities consisting of books for specialized courses. Hostel and mess facilities are excellent with a proper menu and air conditioned rooms 3 to 4 students in each room with their own partitioned cubicles.

reviews.review_heading: Strong academics - Poor control.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at JECRC University is impressive and student friendly. From spacious classrooms to good campus facilities, everything is well organised. The environment feels positive and supportive for academic purpose. This is a very nice thing of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it was the best university for the MCA course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at our campus were among my favourite things. Facility had air conditioning in a number of spaces, including the library and classrooms. Wi-Fi was also available at our college. The hostel boasted first-rate amenities and affordable pricing. The cafeteria was nice, stylish, and affordable.

data.description: JECRC University's faculty members serve as the backbone of its academic excellence. The university is striving to become a benchmark for higher learning education and continuously paving its way to achieve academic, professional, cultural, and social enrichment in the lives of individuals and communities. The educators here are not just professors but guides, mentors, and skilled professionals who came up with quality education at the organisation. The faculty members at JECRC University are fully committed to the success of the students with their adoptive teaching techniques, which is a blend of traditional learning with modern methodologies.

paragraphs: JECRC University offers numerous scholarships to meritorious students across various courses based on academic excellence. The university offers these scholarships in the form of fee waivers. JECRC University scholarships include the eligibility criteria of need-based and sports-based scholarships as well.

The university offers a scholarship bifurcating on the basis of UG, PG, BTech and MBA programme students. The eligibility criteria vary on the basis of Class 12 aggregate/ JEE Main percentile, CAT 2024 percentile score and sports achievements (National and International level). highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Shivajirao Kadam Institute of Technology & Management:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shivajirao Kadam Institute of Technology & Management offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Com and B.Pharma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Shivajirao Kadam Institute of Technology & Management courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Shivajirao Kadam Institute of Technology & Management courses stands around INR 45,000 to 3,00,000.

faqs.answer:

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Well, college is superb but talk about the college with near surroundings also as placements are fin

content.Placements: Well, not that much students take this branch, but those who know and have an interest in electrical can take this course. The average package offered is between 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Whereas, the highest package offered is around 10 LPA - 15 LPA to my knowledge. But we don't get internships directly from college. We have to find a company to do internships.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure for my department are good. All the working machines and labs are available for better understanding. The classrooms are well cleaned and tidy. Well, the quality of food in mess is good but not that much. Regular activity is held in sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Must visit the college।।।

content.Placements: Many big companies come to the college for placements, like Amazon, Byjus, Cape Gemini, Infosys, TCS etc. The placement percentage in the college is 90%. The highest package is Rs. 10 lakhs. The average pack is Rs. 5 lakhs. Internships are also conducted by the college.
content.Infrastructure: There are many computer labs in the college. This college has the biggest workshop in comparison to other colleges of Indore. Both boys and girls hostels have facilities. There are many types of labs in the college. Every festival is celebrated with great pomp in the college.

Shivajirao Kadam Institute of Technology & Management cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 970409 and 1474111 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 970409, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Information Technology turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 970409.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

Considering the Shivajirao Kadam Institute of Technology & Management B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General HS category students were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Information Technology, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with last-round closing ranks of 970409, 1297204, and 1360605, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: Well, college is superb but talk about the college with near surroundings also as placements are fin
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for my department are good. All the working machines and labs are available for better understanding. The classrooms are well cleaned and tidy. Well, the quality of food in mess is good but not that much. Regular activity is held in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Must visit the college।।।
reviews.review_text: There are many computer labs in the college. This college has the biggest workshop in comparison to other colleges of Indore. Both boys and girls hostels have facilities. There are many types of labs in the college. Every festival is celebrated with great pomp in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shivajirao Kadam Institute of Technology & Management.
reviews.review_text:
Shivajirao Kadam Institute offers facilities like a hostel, wifi, labs, sports ground, silent library, and more.
The hostel has more than 20 rooms with a common relaxing room. The food in canteen is also decent; students always gets the facilities of Tv, carrom, chess, and other sources to relax.

reviews.review_heading: Memorable college for the students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is brilliant, with well-structured labs, classrooms, and library. The hostel facilities are also very good, and the management is well-organized.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good and well-developed and provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi speed is good. Our college has a huge library. The food served in our college is good. Students can play many indoor and outdoor games in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and faculty members
reviews.review_text: Our campus is huge and has different buildings for all departments. Many laboratories are available for our course. The library is available for students. The hostel facility is available in our college. Our college provides us with sports facilities like volleyball, basketball, table tennis, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and mentors.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities but has average infrastructure. Classrooms are good. Wi-Fi is provided in the library. Our college doesn't have a hostel. Food served in the canteen is good and hygienically maintained. Medical facilities provided are a first aid box, which is sufficient for basic needs. The space provided for sports and games is sufficient to develop our skills.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college for MBA.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is huge and the infrastructure is great. Air-conditioners are also available in the classrooms. Auditorium, incubation cell, laboratory, library, canteen, hostel, CDC department for placements, and playground are available in our college. Garden area is also provided. sports like volleyball, basketball, etc., are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good compared to other private colleges in Indore.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are very good. Labs are very good. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. A library is available with the latest editions of all books. The canteen food quality is very good. Bus and medical facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good but there are many other options in our city.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and premises of our college are very good. It contains many gardens and a playground. Many labs are available for different purposes with all facilities. Many sports available in our college are volleyball and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: It is a perfect college for studies with good facilities and amazing placements.
reviews.review_text: The college labs, library, and canteen are very good. Cleanliness is maintained. The environment is good. Everything is good here. The canteen is clean, and food is very good. A sports ground is available, and sports training is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is not worth it so you take admission to another college.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi for students. Wi-Fi is available for faculty members only. They don't give us the password. In labs, they don't have inverters. Every time, the light goes off. Classrooms are untidy with broken benches and fans don't work. There is no games period given to us.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and worthy to join the college.
reviews.review_text: The college have all the needy infrastructure. The college provides all the facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, laboratory with smart classrooms. Canteen is very good and hygienic. The college is situated in the outer city of Indore and have a good bus facility.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text:
Good labs with great computers, high-speed Wi-Fi, a decent library, indoor sports like table tennis, carrom, chess, etc., and no outdoor sports.
No hostels are being constructed. The average mess food with not many options.

reviews.review_heading: Our college values knowledge and skills.
reviews.review_text: There are many seminars and webinars every week. Sports activities are also conducted. Many other cultural fests are also organised at Holi, Diwali, and other festivals. Many other curriculum activities are also organised on campus. A club is also organised in our college which helps students in studying.

college_info.intro:
Guru Nanak Institute of Technology - GNIT popular programmes are BTech and BSc. BTech and BSc students are placed in top companies such as SAP Labs, Amadeus Labs, Accenture, Persistent Systems, Amazon, Tata Consulting Engineers, Tech Mahindra, and others. Guru Nanak Institute of Technology - GNIT provides students with the opportunity to learn from experienced and skilled faculty members who specialise in the fields of Health Care and Hospital Industry, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, and others.
Guru Nanak Institute of Technology - GNIT BSc students can work as Information Security Managers, Ethical Hackers, Security Consultants, Cyber Security Analysts, and others. Overall, Guru Nanak Institute of Technology - GNIT is one of the top colleges offering professional education to students. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Guru Nanak Institute of Technology - GNIT offers PG and UG courses. These courses are provided across Food Technology, Electrical Engineering, Cyber Security, and others. At the UG level, the college offers four-year BTech, BSc, BBA, and BCA courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers two-year MCA and MTech courses to students. The college also provides two to three-year diploma courses to students. BTech is provided in 8 specialisations, namely Computer Science & Engineering, Information Technology, and others. BTech (Lateral) is also available in the college. faqs.answer: A:    Guru Nanak Institute of Technology (GNIT) accepts several entrance exams for admission to its B.Tech. programs. Here are the main ones:WBJEE (West Bengal Joint Entrance Examination): This is a state-level entrance exam for admission. JEE Main (Joint Entrance Examination Main): A national-level entrance exam conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA) for admission to various engineering colleges across India.CEE-AMPAI (Common Entrance Examination for Admission to Master of Pharmacy and Allied Courses in India): This exam is specifically for students seeking admission to engineering and pharmacy courses in West Bengal. For more accurate and latest information please visit the official website of Guru Nanak Institute of Technology or by contacting the admission office.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: With some ups and downs, you’ll experience a great college and campus life here.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who were placed last year was 25%. The highest package is 8 LPA, whereas the lowest package is about 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Amazon, Infosys, and Cognizant. This year, about 80% of our students got their internships. Top roles offered are software developer, web designer, UI/UX developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Here, you experience facilities like a gym, a good campus, sports, a library, free Wi-Fi, friendly teachers and students, and a ragging-free environment. It’s somewhere between good and excellent. But sometimes there are delays in starting some classes for the new semester.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college has supportive faculty an updated curriculum, and decent hostel life.

review_content.Placements: Around 75-80 percent of students in my batch got placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA the lowest is 3 LPA and the average package is 5-6 LPA. Major recruiters included TCS Infosys Wipro Capgemini Accenture and some core companies for non-IT branches. Many students also received internships in reputed companies like Cognizant and startups. The common roles offered were software engineer analyst and developer. Overall placements are good especially for CSE/IT.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus has wellequipped classrooms with smart boards highspeed WiFi and a central library with sufficient books and e-resources. Labs are modern and maintained properly. Hostel facilities are decent with spacious rooms 24/7 water and electricity and reasonable cleanliness. The mess food is average but hygienic and the canteen provides better alternatives. Sports grounds and indoor games facilities are also available. Medical facilities on campus are reliable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure, supportive faculty, balanced curriculum, and a vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: On average, from my department, above 75 percent of students get placement. In the previous year, the highest package was 20 LPA. So many companies visit our campus, like Cognizant, Capgemini, Juspay, Accenture, Wipro, etc. In the case of internships, about 60 percent of students get an internship opportunity.
content.Infrastructure: Our college boasts a modern B.Tech infrastructure with well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and an innovative learning environment. The hostel provides a homely stay with clean rooms, Wi-Fi, and nutritious food. They create a perfect blend of comfort, growth, and lifelong memories.

faqs.question: Can I get BTech admission at Guru Nanak Institute of Technology, without entrance exams?
faqs.answer: GNIT candidates need to appear for WBJEE / JEE Main/ CEE-AMPAIfor admission to the B.Tech programme and GATE / CEE-AMPAI/ PGET for M.Tech. program. Candidates need to qualify for the JEXPO examination for admission to the Diploma programs. For other undergraduate programs offered by GNIT, candidates need to qualify for CET.Guru Nanak Institute of Technologyaccepts TS EAMCETfor admission to BTech/ BE courses. Guru Nanak Institute of Technology Admission 2024 for all programs will be based on the entrance examination scores.

According to the rankings from Outlook-ICARE, Guru Nanak Institute of Technology - GNIT outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure, supportive faculty, balanced curriculum, and a vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our college boasts a modern B.Tech infrastructure with well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and an innovative learning environment. The hostel provides a homely stay with clean rooms, Wi-Fi, and nutritious food. They create a perfect blend of comfort, growth, and lifelong memories.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and campus.
reviews.review_text: Our department has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, well-maintained computer labs, electronics labs, and a library for the entire department. Hostel facilities are good with clean rooms, nutritious food, medical aid, and space for sports and games, ensuring a balanced campus life.

reviews.review_heading: With some ups and downs, you’ll experience a great college and campus life here.
reviews.review_text: Here, you experience facilities like a gym, a good campus, sports, a library, free Wi-Fi, friendly teachers and students, and a ragging-free environment. It’s somewhere between good and excellent. But sometimes there are delays in starting some classes for the new semester.

reviews.review_heading: The college has supportive faculty an updated curriculum, and decent hostel life.
reviews.review_text: The campus has wellequipped classrooms with smart boards highspeed WiFi and a central library with sufficient books and e-resources. Labs are modern and maintained properly. Hostel facilities are decent with spacious rooms 24/7 water and electricity and reasonable cleanliness. The mess food is average but hygienic and the canteen provides better alternatives. Sports grounds and indoor games facilities are also available. Medical facilities on campus are reliable.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty, and decent facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus has well-equipped classrooms with smart boards, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a central library with sufficient books and e-resources. Labs are modern and maintained properly. Hostel facilities are decent with spacious rooms, 24/7 water and electricity, and reasonable cleanliness. The mess food is average but hygienic, and the canteen provides better alternatives. Sports grounds and indoor games facilities are also available. Medical facilities on campus are reliable.

reviews.review_heading: Growing institute with balanced academics and activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for ECE is quite good. The classrooms are spacious with projectors, a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, and well-equipped labs for electronics, communication, and basic programming. The library has a good collection of technical books and journals. The hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, 24/7 water, and average but manageable mess food. The canteen food is better than the mess, and medical facilities are available on campus for emergencies. Sports facilities for cricket, footba...

reviews.review_heading: College has excellent infrastructure and strong industry connections for bright future for students.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-equipped labs with modern machinery. There is a central library with a vast collection of books and research papers. Every year, the university organizes a big sports tournament (JIS Spirit). There are separate grounds for every game, and also a common room for indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: The atmosphere of my college is good.
reviews.review_text: Computer labs have ACs in them, and Wi-Fi is available. Library is full of books, and college infrastructure is pretty well. Classrooms have a student capacity of 60. I don't stay in a hostel, but from the reviews I heard that the hostel's rooms are not very good. The food provided there is not of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Guru Nanak Institute of Technology is a good private engineering college.
reviews.review_text: I do not stay in the hostel. I travel daily from my home. But my friends tell me that everything is fine and good. The water and electricity facilities are good and nice. The quality of food is given to the students thrice a day at a particular time.

reviews.review_heading: I think this is a good college for serious studying students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available all the time in college. Labs are very neat and clean. CSE labs have AC room. Library is so good. It has good environment for studying. The faculty is also good. I am not a hostel student but I hear that the hostel is comfortable for students, and also the food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with supportive faculty, placement, good infrastructure, and enjoyable college life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is quite good with proper facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms with projectors, well-maintained labs, and a library that has a wide range of books. Hostel facilities are also decent with clean rooms, proper water supply, and good security arrangements. Mess food is average but hygienic. Canteen provides a wide variety of foods for students. Medical facilities are available on campus for emergencies. Sports ground is well-maintained for outdoor games, along with indoor ...

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good in our college. All kinds of facilities are available, like ground, gym, and air-conditioned labs (for CSE only). I cannot exactly tell about the hostel quality as I do not live there. The college also organises various events of sports, hackathons, quizzes, etc.

reviews.review_heading: GNIT is the best private B.Tech college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on every floor of the college. The lab sessions are very attractive, and the classrooms are neat and clean. The quality of the food in the canteen is good, and the prices are also cheap. There is a huge ground to play cricket, basketball, and volleyball, and there is also a common room with indoor games like carrom, chess, and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and teaching quality with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of GNIT Sodepur is commendable. The classrooms are spacious, well-lit, and equipped with smart boards. Wi-Fi is available across the campus and in the hostel. Labs are well-maintained with updated systems and equipment relevant to the curriculum. The library is stocked with reference books and journals, and has a digital section.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers good infrastructure, smart classrooms, and well-equipped labs.
reviews.review_text: The department has smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a good library. Hostels are clean with basic facilities and Wi-Fi. Mess food is hygienic but average in taste. Medical and sports facilities are available on campus. There is also a playground.

faqs.answer: A:    Avantika University is a private university in Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh. The goal is to develop a passion for learning in the heads of young students. Avantika University is approved by the University Grants Commission and is connected with the AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education). Avantika University fees are very reasonable, making education more accessible to every student. Avantika University fees structure varies from programme to programThe fees of UG courses at Avantika University are :Avantika University for B.Tech Fees is Rs 2,51,000 per year. Avantika University BBA Fees is Rs 1,50,000 per year. Avantika University B.Des Fees is Rs 3.30 Lacs per year.  Avantika University B.Sc Fees is Rs 2.15 Lacs per year.Avantika University BFA Fees is Rs 1.20 Lacs per year.
faqs.question: What is the fees for UG courses at Avantika University Ujjain?

faqs.answer: A:    Avantika University BCom fees includes various components such as tuition fees, hostel fees and one-time admission fees to be paid by candidates during the time of admission. Candidates are required to pay a one-time fee of INR 10,000 during the time of admission. faqs.question: What is the fee of Avantika University BCom?

faqs.answer: A:    Avantika University admissions are either based on entrance exam scores or performance of candidates in the Personal Inteview round. Any of the affiliated colleges or institutes of Avantika University does not offer direct admission in any of the programmes offered at the undergraduate or postgraduate level. The university considers scores in JEE Main, CUET, UCEED, etc. for admission to specific programme. Avantika University also conducts written test for some of the programmes such as BBA, MBA, BCA, etc.
faqs.question: Can I join Avantika University Ujjain directly?

faqs.answer: A:    Avantika University offers 30 seats for each of its MBA specialisations. Students must complete the entire admission procedure to secure the MBA seats. For MBA seats at Avantika University must appear for the entrance exams followed by a personal interview round. Students must apply for the Avantika Management Aptitude Test (AMAT) conducted by the university for MBA admission. Further, before applying for the exams candidates must make sure to have valid MBA eligibility criteria.Eligibility Criteria: Bachelor's Degree or equivalent examination from any stream and must have obtained at least 50% aggregate in all subjects with proficiency in the English language.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee structure for BDes at Avantika University?
overview_faqs.answer: Avantika University BDes fees comprises various components such as tuition fees, hostel fees and one-time admission fees. Candidates who get admission to the BDes programme at one of the affiliated colleges of Avantika University Ujjain are required to pay a one-time admission fee of INR 10,000. Mentioned below is the tabular representation of Avantika University fees for BDes programmes:Course NameTotal Tuition FeesHostel FeesBDesINR 12.80 lakh-INR 16 lakhINR 8.10 Lacs to INR 10.10 lakhNote: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at Avantika University Ujjain?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee for BTech at Avantika University Ujjain range from INR 4.1 Lacs – INR 7 Lakh. The fees has multiple other fee components such as one-time payment of INR 10,000. The fees must be paid annually or semester-wise depending admission payment system of the university. However, the one time fees are to be paid only once during admission.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for UG courses at Avantika University Ujjain?
overview_faqs.answer: Avantika University is a private university in Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh. The goal is to develop a passion for learning in the heads of young students. Avantika University is approved by the University Grants Commission and is connected with the AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education). Avantika University fees are very reasonable, making education more accessible to every student. Avantika University fees structure varies from programme to programThe fees of UG courses at Avantika University are :Avantika University for B.Tech Fees is Rs 2,51,000 per year. Avantika University BBA Fees is Rs 1,50,000 per year. Avantika University B.Des Fees is Rs 3.30 Lacs per year. Avantika University B.Sc Fees is Rs 2.15 Lacs per year.Avantika University BFA Fees is Rs 1.20 Lacs per year.

overview_faqs.question: Is Avantika University good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Avantika University can be considered as a good option to pursue the MBA programme. The affiliated colleges have good infrastructure, placements and faculty members. The highest and average package offered during Avantika University placements 2024 stood at INR 20.5 LPA and INR 8.5 LPA, respectively. Companies such as Planet Spark, TCS and Deloitte USI participate in the 2024 campus placements.

review_summary.college_name: Avantika University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Studies - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities , average faculty, fees too high, excellent curriculum.

content.Placements: My course was BBA, I studied for the first year now in second year, I have heard from my seriors that the placements are below average, a very few students from. The class get places, 10-15%, highest, package as offered to a MDes student, 2 years ago, 12 LPA, after that average package is just 5-6 LPA, even after getting an MBA, almost all students got internships, from companies like cloud zappy and many local startups, roles offered were, business development, sales, intern position for administration and management purposes.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is amazing! Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen with good food, big sports grounds and walking area. very spacious, big and very beautiful. With a lot of greenery and natural beauty. Hostel was beautiful with a good clinic, 24/7 WiFi, water, electricity.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Industrial Design - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Avantika University.

content.Placements: Currently, the placement season is going on; as of now, 6 lpa is the average package for this year; last year, it was 8.5 lpa. IBM, Capgemini, and Deloitte are some of the top recruiting companies. Internships are compulsory for 6th semester students. So there are 100% placements for internships.
content.Infrastructure: The educational infrastructure is very good; the workshops, lab, computer lab and library are well-equipped with all the necessities. The hostel mess and canteen are also exceptionally good but equally expensive. The canteen is quite affordable. We do have a medical facility but it is very poor. Sports and games are also quite good, and the gym is very well-equipped. We've got table tennis, lawn tennis, basketball, volleyball, mini-football, and cricket grounds available too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Communication Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Avantika university is one of the best the University.

content.Placements: The placement opportunities are remarkable, especially in fields design and engineering. Students of avantika university get place in various companies like tcs, IBM, PixelaUX, Extentia, Mindtree, u00a0L&T, etc. And also chance to work with companies via internships and get a good working experience. University provides almost 90%placements. u00a0A total of 52 companies provided internship opportunities students.
content.Infrastructure: University have beautiful, lushgreen campus. Infrastructure is awesome, hostel and mess are really nice. Internet (Wi-Fi/LAN ) is available 24*7. Library and classroom are spacious. Thus overall facilities and infrastructure avantika at Avantika are amazing.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Industrial Design - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Best University for Design and overall Development.

content.Placements: Our college takes a lot of effort towards placements as well-known companies and names are connected. Recently, out of 21 M.Des students, 17 M.Des students have been placed in excellent companies in their respective fields. In companies like Capgemini, L&T, Tata Motors, DOMS Industries, TouchMagic, Cusmat Companies, PixelaUX, Extentia, Mindtree, YUJ etc recruit students.
content.Infrastructure: 24/7 Wi-Fi Service. Equipped Labs. Both Physical and Virtual library. Excellent facilities in the Hostels. Twin sharing rooms with attached bathrooms 24/7 medical facilities. Food is highly nutritious. Non-veg strictly prohibited. Daily outings to Ujjain City and Indore outing once in a month. Sports - Football, Cricket, Table Tennis, Carrom, Chess, Badminton, etc are also available.

individual_reviews.course: M.Des. in Industrial Design - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Best Design College/ University.

content.Placements: I was student of Avantika University, I very much convinced with Avantika Academic Model. I am currently working in MNC. It is Best Design college/ University in Madhya Pradesh. Courses designed @ Avantika University are industry oriented and updated with Technology.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure @ Avantika University is good, The lush green campus is very much attractive, Legacy of Ujjain. Hostel and Mess are also good. 24/7 Internet (Wi-Fi/ LAN) available. Sports we used to play Cricket, Volley, Kabaddi. Access to classroom and Library is also 24/7.

admission_overview.college_name: Avantika University Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Application Process

admission_process.title: Avantika University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Avantika University admissionis done by written test or accepts national or state-level entrance exams for admission to various courses. The university offers various courses at the UG, PG, and doctoral levels in various streams such as Engineering, Management, Design, Law, etc. through its schools. Candidates can apply online on the official website of Avantika University.
Below areAvantika University coursesalong with eligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 in any stream with at least 50% aggregate from a recognised board
Class 12 in any stream with a minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised board

Candidates applying for admission to Avantika University need to fulfill the eligibility criteria, and other criteria of selection for the programs. Applicants willing to seek admission at Avantika University are required to fill out the application form on the official portal of the university. The process of selection encompasses the valid score in the entrance exam mandatory for the course at Avantika University. Here are the details of the same:
Application Process

Students are required to apply for admission on the official portal of Avantika University and fill in the details of registration. After completing the registration form, it is mandatory for students to attach required valid documents and the application fee.

BTech admission at Avantika University requires that students qualify in JEE main or state-level entrance exams. Design Scholarship Test is required for Bachelor of Design admission at Avantika University.It conducts the written entrance exam for admission in MBA, BCA, BBA, etc.
Avantika University releases the merit list of the students selected. Students applying for admission in any of the courses at Avantika University are required to qualify PI.
Counseling and Allocation of Seats
Selected students are required to personally come for document verification and pay the Avantika University fees for securing their seat.

headings.text: Steps for Avantika University Admission Process 2025

courses_data.name: Avantika University BDes Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MITID DAT, NIFT Entrance Exam, UCEED, NID Entrance Exam, CUET, Design Aptitude Test (DAT), CEED
courses_data.description: Avantika University offers a four-year BDes course spread across eight semesters. The university offers BDes in various specialisations such as Industrial Design, Transportation Design, Interior & Furniture Design, Information Design, etc. Admission to the BDes programme is based on DST, MIT-DAT, UCEED, NID-DAT or NIFT scores. Candidates who have completed Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for the BDes course.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BDes Avantika University?
faqs.answer: Avantika University offers admission to BDes programme based on the entrance exam scores of the candidate. The university considers scores in UCEED, MIT-DAT, NID-DAT or NIFT. Besides, Avantika University also conducts a Design Scholarship Test to shortlist candidates for BDes admission. Candidates selected based on entrance exam scores need to further pass the personal interview round for final admission.

faqs.question: Which are the various BDes specialisations offered by Avantika University?
faqs.answer: Avantika University offers four-year full-time BDes programme divided into eight semesters. The university offers BDes at the UG level to candidates who have completed their Class 12. Below are the BDes specialisations offered at Avantika University:Industrial DesignTransportation DesignInterior & Furniture DesignUser Experience DesignInformation DesignImmersive Media DesignInteraction Design, etc.

faqs.question: When can I apply for BDes admission at Avantika University?
faqs.answer: Avantika University BDes application processhas begun for the academic year 2024. Candidates who want to take admission to the BDes programme in any of the affiliated colleges of Avantika University must apply online on the official website of the University.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for BDes at Avantika University?
faqs.answer: Avantika University BDes admissions 2024is a multi-stage process. Given below is the admission process for BDes programme offered at Avantika University:STEP 1: Visit Avantika University website and register for new admission by clicking on the 'Apply Now' tab. Candidates must provide personal, guardian, educational and other details in the registration form, upload the documents and pay the application fees.STEP 2: Appear for the Design Scholarship Test/ MIT Design Aptitude Test/ UCEED/ NID-DAT

courses_data.name: Avantika University BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Avantika University offers a four-year, full-time BTech Computer Science and Engineering course in seven different specialisations. Some of these includeFull Stack Development, Artificial Intelligence,Cloud Computing, Interaction Design etc. The course is spread acorss eight semesters. Candidates who have passed Class 12 or equivalent examination from a recognised Board with Physics, Mathematics and English as compulsory subjects with a minimum of 50% aggregate in and 50% marks in English can apply for the BTech course. Candidates must a valid rank and score in JEE Main or any other state entrance examination to get admission in the BTech course.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Avantika University for BTech?
faqs.answer: Avantika University offers admission to BTech course based on entrance exam scores of the candidate. The university considers scores in JEE Main, CUET or any other state-level entrance exams. The university also conducts Avantika Scholastic Test (AST) for BTech admission. Besides, candidates must also fulfil the eligibility requirements to get a seat in the BTech programme.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at Avantika University?
faqs.answer: Avantika University offers four-year BTech programme divided into eight semesters. The university offers BTech in Computer Science Engineering at the UG level. Candidates after completing Class 12 can apply for any of the below BTech specialisations:Full Stack DevelopmentData ScienceArtificial IntelligenceCyber SecurityCloud ComputingUX Engineering

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at Avantika University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete Class 12 with Physics, Mathematics, and Chemistry with at least 50% aggregate and 50% in English from a recognised board to apply for Avantika University BTech programme. Students must also be proficient in Engineering. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility at the time of admission.

courses_data.description: The MBA is a PG level course of the University. The duration is 2 year divided into 4 semesters. Its specialisations include Marketing,HR,Finance,Business Analytics, Supply Chain Management and International Business. The eligibility criteria is 50% in graduation.

faqs.answer: Avantika University can be considered as a good option to pursue the MBA programme. The affiliated colleges have good infrastructure, placements and faculty members. The highest and average package offered during Avantika University placements 2024 stood at INR 20.5 LPA and INR 8.5 LPA, respectively. faqs.question: Can I join Avantika University Ujjain directly?
faqs.answer: Avantika University admissions are either based on entrance exam scores or performance of candidates in the Personal Inteview round. Any of the affiliated colleges or institutes of Avantika University does not offer direct admission in any of the programmes offered at the undergraduate or postgraduate level. The university considers scores in JEE Main, CUET, UCEED, etc. for admission to specific programme. Avantika University also conducts written test for some of the programmes such as BBA, MBA, BCA, etc.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at Avantika University without JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Avantika University considers JEE Main scores for admission to BTech programmes. However, it not compulsory to have a JEE Main score for admission. Aspirants with a valid score in CUET or any other state-level entrance exam can also get admission. Besides, the university also conducts AST or Avantika Scholastic Test for BTech admission. Aspirants with JEE Main score are open to some of the BTech scholarships offered by the university.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for various programmes at Avantika University?
faqs.answer: Avantika University admissionis entrance-based/ Personal Interview-based. A minimum of Class 12 is required for the undergraduate programme and a Bachelor's degree in the relevant stream for postgraduate programmes admissions. Given below is the list of Avantika University courses along with their eligibility criteria:Course NameCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with Physics, Mathematics, and Chemistry with at least 50% aggregate and 50% in English from a recognised boardBCom (Hons)Class 12 in any stream with a minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised boardBDesClass 12 in any stream with at least 50% aggregate from a recognised boardBBAClass 12 in any stream with at least 50% aggregate from a recognised boardBCAClass 12 in any stream with a minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised boardMBAGraduation degree in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate in all subjects

faqs.question: Are admissions open for BDes at Avantika University?
faqs.answer: Avantika University BDes admission process 2024 has been commenced by the University and the candidates who want to take admission to the BDes programme must apply for admission on the official website of the University.

placement_data.title: Avantika University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Avantika University has a dedicated Career Services team that provides expert guidance and professional exposure to students. The professional exposure service is offered to develop entrepreneurial culture among students for harnessing the power of technology and design. Further, the team help students in their career development through workshops, interactive sessions and portfolio review session . Every year, the placement team at the University partn ers with international and national organisations for campus placement and internships.

Companies such as Planet Spark, TCS and Deloitte USI visited the campus during placement 2024. The highest and average package offered during Avantika University placements 2024 stood at I NR 20.5 LPA and INR 8.5 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: What is the fees for UG courses at Avantika University Ujjain?
faqs.answer: Avantika University is a private university in Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh. The goal is to develop a passion for learning in the heads of young students. Avantika University is approved by the University Grants Commission and is connected with the AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education). Avantika University fees are very reasonable, making education more accessible to every student. Avantika University fees structure varies from programme to program The fees of UG courses at Avantika University are : Avantika University for B.Tech Fees is Rs 2,51,000 per year. Avantika University BBA Fees is Rs 1,50,000 per year. Avantika University B.Des Fees is Rs 3.30 Lacs per year. Avantika University B.Sc Fees is Rs 2.15 Lacs per year. Avantika University BFA Fees is Rs 1.20 Lacs per year.

Recently, the institute ranked #153 in the India Today 2025 under the Engineering (Private) category, and #183 under Engineering. The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The following article covers all the information around Avantika University rankings:

hostel_campus.college_name: Avantika University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities , average faculty, fees too high, excellent curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing! Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen with good food, big sports grounds and walking area. very spacious, big and very beautiful. With a lot of greenery and natural beauty. Hostel was beautiful with a good clinic, 24/7 WiFi, water, electricity.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Avantika University.
reviews.review_text: The educational infrastructure is very good; the workshops, lab, computer lab and library are well-equipped with all the necessities. The hostel mess and canteen are also exceptionally good but equally expensive. The canteen is quite affordable. We do have a medical facility but it is very poor. Sports and games are also quite good, and the gym is very well-equipped. We've got table tennis, lawn tennis, basketball, volleyball, mini-football, and cricket grounds available too.

reviews.review_heading: Avantika university is one of the best the University.
reviews.review_text: University have beautiful, lushgreen campus. Infrastructure is awesome, hostel and mess are really nice. Internet (Wi-Fi/LAN ) is available 24*7. Library and classroom are spacious. Thus overall facilities and infrastructure avantika at Avantika are amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Best University for Design and overall Development.
reviews.review_text:
24/7 Wi-Fi Service. Equipped Labs. Both Physical and Virtual library. Excellent facilities in the Hostels. Twin sharing rooms with attached bathrooms 
24/7 medical facilities. Food is highly nutritious. Non-veg strictly prohibited. Daily outings to Ujjain City and Indore outing once in a month. Sports - Football, Cricket, Table Tennis, Carrom, Chess, Badminton, etc are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Best Design College/ University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure @ Avantika University is good, The lush green campus is very much attractive, Legacy of Ujjain. Hostel and Mess are also good. 24/7 Internet (Wi-Fi/ LAN) available. Sports we used to play Cricket, Volley, Kabaddi. Access to classroom and Library is also 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Healthy environment and goo infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The university campus is too notch with all the best facilities. Wi-Fi is available 24/7 both in classroom as well as in hostel. The Library is well-equipped with wide range of resources. From manual to digital it has vast range of collection. The only problem is that we have only one stationary and it gets really troublesome when all the students are in need of taking prints and all. The menu and taste of our cafeteria is really good and we have number of items to choose from. As of speaking ho...

reviews.review_heading: The ambience is pretty good, best college in Ujjain I would say.
reviews.review_text: The food at the mess is really fascinating and you can har the beverages over there. The hostel rooms are also good with 3 people in one room but there is a lot of space over there. The hostel room are completely equipped with 20mbps speed of Wi-Fi also.

reviews.review_heading: Avantika - Highly Disappointed
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the college is good. The students are attracted by the facilities and took admission. 
Wifi and labs are 4 Ratings 
Hostel facilities are also good . Earlier the food given by them was nice but now they are not giving that good. Below the expectations of the students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the friendly environment of the college.
reviews.review_text: If we talk about the available infrastructure, they provide free Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The quality of food is fabulous; I love it. They pre-plan the menu for the students according to their culture, ensuring equality so every student feels comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Wonderful campus with good style of teaching.
reviews.review_text:
Best Wi-Fi network and excellent infrastructure.
Quality of food is amazing, every weekend best snacks and cuisines food are offered to students as compared to other colleges. There is no non-veg food available. Every day after classes outing to Ujjain city is organized for 2 hours where students can explore city as well have their meals and other stuff.

reviews.review_heading: Very good campus with good faculties, but it can improve the placement cell qualities and the Mess.
reviews.review_text: The entire university is Wi-Fi enabled, including the classrooms and hostel. We have a computer lab. The decorum is well maintained. We have a library also in the Avantika University, which is also very good. I am a day scholar, I dont have a particular idea about the hostel and the hostel life, but the canteen, its good and its very affordable as well as a hygienic medical facility. Sports and games are being organised every month.

college_info.college_name: Avantika University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Avantika University offers scholarships on the basis of merit, need and means. The scholarship schemes at the university include tuition fee waivers and stipends offered to meritorious, needy and deserving students. The scholarships at Avantika University not only favour the academically gifted but also support students from a sports background and students from economically backward families. The university offers tuition fee waivers of up to 100% and a maximum stipend of INR 12,000 per month.
Note: The renewal of scholarships will solely depend on consistent high performance in the relevant fields.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: This college is a good option for engineering students with supportive and decent placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements are above average, and 90 percent of the students are placed in my course. The highest package offered is 6 to 7 LPA and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. 80 percent of the students are placed in internships for my course, including Infosys and L&T companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good in our college, and the placement training is excellent for us. There are many facilities in our college, like labs, Wi-Fi, and a library. The library hour is useful to get new information for us. Sports and many events will be conducted in our colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent coaching with good infrastructure and a peaceful environment.

review_content.Placements: New price Shri Bhavnai College of Engineering and Technology has good placements, with around 90-95% of students placed. The highest package is about 10 LPA, with an average of 3-4 LPA. Many students get internships in IT and core companies, with roles like software developer, tester, and engineering positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a well-stocked library here, and we are getting a library period once a week to gain more knowledge. We are also allowed to take library books home with proper registration. Classrooms have smart boards through which presentations are done by the staff members for a better skill environment.

Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Civil and Structural Engineering. answer.text: New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MCACandidate must have completed Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration with minimum 50% (45 % for reserved category). Candidate must have mathematics subject at 10+2 or at Graduate level. The qualifying degree examination can be 10+2+3/4/5 years pattern or 10+3 years Diploma +3 years pattern or 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Civil and Structural Engineering. Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination. Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.

review_summary.college_name: New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college facility is awesome, with a practical explanation.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students were placed in my course. Minimum 8 LPA and Maximum 28 LPA were the packages offered for us. Hexaware, SOTI, and Pegatron were the top recruiting companies. 90 percent of students got internships at Pegatron. VLSI engineer and embedded engineer were the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Very nice teaching and supporting infrastructure. Good quality of food, all sports and games, and good medical facilities. Had all types of playgrounds and immediate medical facilities also. Also, arranged a big canteen for students to enjoy their break time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college offers good teaching, active campus life, and growing opportunities in AI & DS.

content.Placements: In the AI & DS department, no students are placed yet because we are the first batch in our college. Placements are still ongoing. Overall, the college placement percentage is around 50–80%. The highest package offered is about 20 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Companies like TCS, Cognizant, Avasoft, and Hexaware visit the college for placements. Students also try for internships through college support and outside companies. The top roles offered are Data Analyst, AI Engineer, App Developer, Full Stack Developer, Data Scientist, UI/UX Designer, and Software Developer.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college is a good option for engineering students with supportive and decent placements.

content.Placements: Placements are above average, and 90 percent of the students are placed in my course. The highest package offered is 6 to 7 LPA and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. 80 percent of the students are placed in internships for my course, including Infosys and L&T companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good in our college, and the placement training is excellent for us. There are many facilities in our college, like labs, Wi-Fi, and a library. The library hour is useful to get new information for us. Sports and many events will be conducted in our colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Excellent coaching with good infrastructure and a peaceful environment.

content.Placements: New price Shri Bhavnai College of Engineering and Technology has good placements, with around 90-95% of students placed. The highest package is about 10 LPA, with an average of 3-4 LPA. Many students get internships in IT and core companies, with roles like software developer, tester, and engineering positions.
content.Infrastructure: We have a well-stocked library here, and we are getting a library period once a week to gain more knowledge. We are also allowed to take library books home with proper registration. Classrooms have smart boards through which presentations are done by the staff members for a better skill environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college infrastructure is simple and good. The college is improving day by day in everything.

content.Placements: The college provides a good placement cell and places the students in reputed companies like Zoho, Infosys, and TCS. Many companies visit the campus, and students get job opportunities and internships. The placement department is helpful for the students' career growth.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good facilities like clean classrooms, laboratories, and a library. The playground is clean and well-maintained. Students can play any games, and equipment is available. The college mess provides a hygienic and clean environment. The menu is simple, and the taste is good.

placement_data.title: NPSBCET Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The 2025 placement session is ongoing. So far, over 200 students have been placed . The highest package offered as of now is INR 20 LPA and the average package stood at INR 8 LPA . The NPSBCET placement percentage for 2025 stands at 88% . The list of recruiters that participated in New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology placements 2025 included TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, HCL Technologies Ltd, Hexaware Technologies and many others.

The course-wise placement data has also been released. During placements 2025, 88% of BTech students have been placed. The median salary for BTech stands at INR 20 LPA . A total of 215 BTech students gratuated in 2025 and out of these 2 opted for higher studies. Furthermore, the average salary offered to PG 2-year courses including MBA , MCA , MTech was INR 15 LPA .

faqs.question: How are the placements at New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: The NPSBCET placements 2025 are ongoing. As of now 88% of students have been placed. The number of students placed is more than 200. The highest salary offered so far is INR 20 LPA and the average package offered is INR 8 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the highest salary offered during New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology placements?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered to the 2025 passing out batch was INR 20 LPA. The average package offered was INR 8 LPA. The placements 2025 are ongoing. Hence, the salary is subject to change later.

faqs.question: Does New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology has been rated 2.6 on placements on the basis of 5 reviews done by students. In New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology, 105 students were admitted in year 2015-16, out of which 56 graduated in 2018-19. From this, 51 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 180000 and 5 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2016-17, 183 students were admitted, out of which 47 graduated in 2019-20. From this, 43 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 230000 and 3 students got selected for higher studies. In New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology, 241 students were admitted in year 2017-18, out of which 176 graduated in 2020-21. From this, 104 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 199000 and 3 students got selected for higher studies.

faqs.question: How much is the median salary of B.E. / B.Tech course by New Prince Shri Bhavani College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Median salary of B.E. / B.Tech course is INR 199,000 as per the reports/data available.
