reviews.review_heading: Our college facility is awesome, with a practical explanation.
reviews.review_text: Very nice teaching and supporting infrastructure. Good quality of food, all sports and games, and good medical facilities. Had all types of playgrounds and immediate medical facilities also. Also, arranged a big canteen for students to enjoy their break time.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers good teaching, active campus life, and growing opportunities in AI & DS.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are well-maintained and comfortable for learning. The campus provides free Wi-Fi for students. Department has labs and a library. They are useful for studies and practical learning. The hostel infrastructure is good and well-maintained. The food in the mess and canteen is average. But new canteens are scheduled to open in February 2026, which are expected to be better. Medical facilities are available on campus. The college supports sports and games such as cricket, basketball, kh...

reviews.review_heading: This college is a good option for engineering students with supportive and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good in our college, and the placement training is excellent for us. There are many facilities in our college, like labs, Wi-Fi, and a library. The library hour is useful to get new information for us. Sports and many events will be conducted in our colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent coaching with good infrastructure and a peaceful environment.
reviews.review_text: We have a well-stocked library here, and we are getting a library period once a week to gain more knowledge. We are also allowed to take library books home with proper registration. Classrooms have smart boards through which presentations are done by the staff members for a better skill environment.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is simple and good. The college is improving day by day in everything.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities like clean classrooms, laboratories, and a library. The playground is clean and well-maintained. Students can play any games, and equipment is available. The college mess provides a hygienic and clean environment. The menu is simple, and the taste is good.

reviews.review_heading: I have a great college life and good placement.
reviews.review_text: There are well-maintained machines and proper lab facilities. The project room is very clean and neat. The classrooms are eco-friendly and have facilities like a library, canteen, sports room, gym, etc. The hostel food is very hygienic and clean. The canteen has delicious and hygienic food, and they provide RO-purified drinking water.

reviews.review_heading: The academics are strong here, making it good for career growth.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are hygienic and clean with a green environment. Labs are well-maintained. The college has modern, unique infrastructure. A disciplined library is available, along with friendly staff members. Physical education is also very good compared to academics.

reviews.review_heading: The platform to learn and grow.
reviews.review_text: Our college has spacious classrooms, well-equipped labs, and playgrounds. I am a day scholar who comes by college bus. It will pick and drop on time. The quality of the food in the canteen is good. Sports activities conducted are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: There is a good environment to improve our careers.
reviews.review_text: Good and safe transport facilities are provided for day scholars. Laboratories are fully equipped for practical Learning. Classrooms and campus infrastructure are well-maintained. The college atmosphere is located in full of nature. It feels very comfortable to learn.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the study environment.
reviews.review_text: Students can choose courses based on their interests, like B.E., B.Tech., MCA, and MBA in our college. It provides good infrastructure and facilities like labs, library, transport, sports, and hostel, which help in both studies and everyday life. The library can be accessible for our convenience.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are PhD holders.
reviews.review_text: All labs have Wi-Fi facilities in high TBPS and modernised lab equipment. It has smart classes, and video lectures are held weekly for 3 days. Foreign authors' and standard author books are available. Hostel rooms are highly neat and clean with ventilated rooms and a green garden. Restrooms are cleaned twice a day by sweepers. Separate garbage collectors are available in the room. Vegetarian and non-vegetarian menus are provided on a daily basis in a hygienic manner.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with decent placements and friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is neatly maintained. It ensures the safety of all the hostellers. The mess and canteen food are decent. Basic medical support is provided by the college. In case of emergencies, the hospitals are at a safe distance for students to access.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, helpful faculty, and active campus life.
reviews.review_text: New Price Shri Bhavani College has Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a good library. Hostels are clean and ventilated, with a mess/canteen serving veg and non-veg food. Medical facilities are available on campus, and sports grounds support physical activities. Overall, facilities are good and supportive for academics and campus life.

reviews.review_heading: The best college to shape our careers.
reviews.review_text: Despite me being a day scholar, I have heard from my friends that the hostel provides excellent food and a variety of menus. Free Wi-Fi is provided all around the hostel as well as the campus. No one is permitted outside the hostel without a proper GATE pass, and I would highly recommend this college for the safety.

reviews.review_heading: AIDS here is the best career choice I have made.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is awesome, and we enjoy the resources provided by our college. We are given free Wi-Fi all around the campus. I'm very satisfied with choosing the course and college. We are given sports hour every week, and our sports faculty assists us in games. We have separate sports facilities for both girls and boys.

review_summary.college_name: IIIT Pune Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A college that has yet to unleash its true potential.

content.Placements: The placement scene of the college is good. Recently, more than 10 students were placed at Amazon. There is also an in-house startup named Cater.AI, which is working on innovative concepts and offering internships. Since the technical clubs provide such good guidance, navigating the placement scene is easy.
content.Infrastructure: Since the permanent campus is just being built, some flaws are there, but they will be resolved soon. The academic building has state-of-the-art facilities and infrastructure. The current facilities include a pure veg mess, table tennis, badminton court, and much more. The gym is yet to be set up.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a new college with great opportunities.

content.Placements: Overall, placements are good but there was a drop in 2024 due to recession. The highest package of the CSE department is 53 LPA and that for the ECE department is 47 LPA. However, the average package of the ECE department is higher compared to the CSE department. The average package ranges from 16-17 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Currently, it has a temporary campus but in the next academic year, the campus is going to be shifted to Talegaon as a permanent campus. Hostels are well-maintained and the mess is also good. Wi-Fi, library, and other sports equipment are limited to the campus. However, IIIT Pune stood 7th in inter-IIIT games.

admission_process.title: IIIT Pune Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IIIT Pune admission processincludes the application process, selection round, cutoff, merit list and counselling. Find below the complete process for IIIT Pune admission 2025:
STEP 1: IIIT Pune Application Process 2025

For IIIT Pune BTech admission, candidates must visit the official website of NTA to apply for the JEE Main entrance exam. For MTech admission, candidates need to apply for GATE. Further, candidates have to apply on the institute's official website for the PhD and Certificate course admission. Moreover, the aspirant shall ensure that the application form is submitted within the prescribed due date.
STEP 2: IIIT Pune Cutoff List

After the application process, the counselling bodies release a course-wise cutoff list. The cutoff list indicates the minimum required score in the respective entrance exam for a candidate to become eligible for admission. Candidates with a score equal to or more than the cutoff marks can apply.
STEP 3: IIIT Pune Counselling

Candidates applying for a BTech course further have to go through JoSAA for seat allotment and, for MTech admission, CCMT conducts the counselling round. While the candidates who apply for a PhD may have to go through an interview round.
STEP 4: IIIT Pune Admission Confirmation

After the selection rounds and counselling, seats are allotted to the eligible candidates. Selected students can further pay the required fee to confirm their seats. The admission/registration of the students shall be provisional and shall be subject to verification of the furnished documents with the original documents. The institute will keep the original TC & Migration Certificate.

IIIT Pune admission for BTech and MTech courses is done basis of JEE Main and GATE scores, respectively. The mode of application at IIIT Pune is online. However, before applying candidates must check out the eligibility criteria as per the IIIT Pune admission guidelines.IIIT Pune course-wiseeligibility criteria are tabulated below:

IIIT Pune feesrange from INR 15,000 to INR 8.7 lakh. The Institute releases dates for fee payment after the candidates have completed the counselling process. The fee includes multiple components such as Development Fee, Miscellaneous Fee, Alumni Association Fee, etc. Also, the candidate must pay a caution deposit of INR 5,000 which is refundable. Tabulated below are course-wise fees for IIIT Pune 2025:

IIIT Pune offers a limited number of seats for its UG, PG, Certificate, and PhD courses. The institute conducts seat allocations via counselling bodies such as JoSAA and CCMT. Most of the seats at IIIT Puneare reserved for students from SC/ST/OBC communities. Find below IIIT Pune course-wise seat intake for 2025:

The right approach and a preparation plan for admission to BTech at IIIT Pune are all that is needed to ace JEE Main. While students who are serious about getting into an IIT start preparing from Class 11, a prep strategy for the exam is mentioned below:
While the short-term goal must be to clear JEE Main, the ultimate objective must be to qualify JEE Advanced exam, check out thepreparation strategy for JEE Advanced.
For more information about IIIT Pune check out the below video:

faqs.question: What specialisations are offered under the M.Tech programme at IIIT Pune?
faqs.answer: The MTech programme of two-years (full-time) is offered by IIIT Pune under its two specialisations namely Computer Science & Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering.These programmes are established in such a way that they offer high technical expertise and experience in research.Students have an option to pick up their specialisation depending on their educational background and careers.The programme is theoretical and practical.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for M.Tech at IIIT Pune?
faqs.answer: IIIT Pune provides entry into M.Tech programme on the basis of GATE with subsequent CCMT counselling as the major part.The candidates who are eligible to appear in the seat allotment process will have to register themselves in the CCMT portal.The candidates who fail to acquire a GATE score can take the written test and interview of IIIT Pune.It is through these tests that final selection on performance and eligibility criteria is done.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for the M.Tech programme at IIIT Pune in 2026?
faqs.answer: Students with a Bachelor degree in Engineering or Technology are eligible to apply to M.Tech at IIIT Pune.The requirement of admission under CCMT route is a valid GATE score.Non GATE candidates also can apply but then they have to pass the IIIT Pune internal written and interview examination.Scholars applying to the institute have to fulfill the academic and paper criteria.

faqs.question: Is direct admission possible at IIIT Pune?
faqs.answer: No, it is not possible to get a direct admission in IIIT Pune since the institute admits only through a rigorous process that considers the JEE Main score. The process is centralized counseling done by JoSAA (Joint Seat Allocation Authority) or CSAB (Central Seat Allocation Board). All the students need to clear JEE Main and undergo the counseling procedure for getting the seat in IIIT Pune.

faqs.question: Can I get IIIT Pune through MHT CET?
faqs.answer: No, admissions to IIIT Pune are not done through MHT CET. IIIT Pune provides admission to its undergraduate courses, like BTech, through the JEE Main exam, followed by JoSAA/CSAB counseling. If you want to get into IIIT Pune, you must be eligible for JEE Main and participate in the centralized counseling process. MHT CET is mainly used for admissions to state-level engineering colleges in Maharashtra.

placement_data.title: IIIT Pune Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: IIIT Pune has released its placement report for BTech and MTech for 2025. The highest package recorded for BTech CSE and ECE stood at INR 45 LPA and INR 28.99 LPA , respectively. The average package for the BTech CSE and ECE recorded during IIIT Pune placements 2025 was INR 17.12 LPA and INR 14.80 LPA , respectively. Additionally, the placement rate achieved for the same is 75.7% and 45.09%.
The placement rate for MTech stood at 72.73% . Further, the highest and average package offered to MTech students was INR 22 LPA and INR 18.5 LPA , respectively.

description: IIIT Pune cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIIT Pune JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last 8 years of IIIT Pune JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIIT Pune JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIIT Pune CSE cutoff 2025 was 27931 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 38412, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the IIIT Pune B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 27931 and 38412 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 27931 and 38412, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIIT Pune. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIIT Pune to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of IIIT Pune. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) and M.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (Internet of Things) with last round cutoff scores of 536 and 354, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 354 and 536. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 326 and 456 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at IIIT Pune - Indian Institute of Information Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

IIIT Pune also accepts DASA UG scores for BE/ BTech and BArch admission. Candidates seeking admission to IIIT Pune can refer to the table given below to check out the DASA UG previous year cutoffs for the General category students:

hostel_campus.college_name: IIIT Pune Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Reach the official website of the accepted entrance exam.

reviews.review_heading: A college that has yet to unleash its true potential.
reviews.review_text: Since the permanent campus is just being built, some flaws are there, but they will be resolved soon. The academic building has state-of-the-art facilities and infrastructure. The current facilities include a pure veg mess, table tennis, badminton court, and much more. The gym is yet to be set up.

reviews.review_heading: It is a new college with great opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Currently, it has a temporary campus but in the next academic year, the campus is going to be shifted to Talegaon as a permanent campus. Hostels are well-maintained and the mess is also good. Wi-Fi, library, and other sports equipment are limited to the campus. However, IIIT Pune stood 7th in inter-IIIT games.

reviews.review_heading: Electronics and communication engineering in IIIT Pune.
reviews.review_text: The campus is currently temporary and taken on rent, but the permanent campus will be ready soon. The campus area is very good, with good connectivity and availability of all kinds of products. Water coolers and heaters are available 24/7. Room cleaning services are also good, and the cleaning staff is very friendly, good, and honest.

reviews.review_heading: Most things are going to change because shifting to new campus, so I am not sure about facilities.
reviews.review_text: We are going to shift to our new campus in the upcoming session, so I don’t have much idea about the infrastructure. However, since it is a completely new location, there will be no hotels or restaurants nearby. The new campus spans 100 acres and is situated in a beautiful location. The mess food is neither too good nor too bad and currently serves only vegetarian meals.

reviews.review_heading: It is good in academics but lacks in fests or extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection is not good, most of the time it is not working properly. In the lab, 15 percent of devices are not working. In classrooms, benches are not inclined. In the library, the number of books is comparatively low. Medical facilities, sports, and games are very poor.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college except for the campus, which will be shifted in a semester.
reviews.review_text: Right now, the college is operating from a temporary campus, so facilities are limited. However, all the necessary things are available, but don't expect too much. The food in the mess is okayish and manageable. There are not many sports facilities in the hostel; they only have a table tennis table.

reviews.review_heading: Not a great campus but have great coordination between seniors, juniors, and teachers.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very poor especially Wi-Fi on college campus. Since it is a permanent campus and after a few months it will be shifted to the new campus. Mess is pretty good with 4-time meals in a day and great service. Hostel timing is between 6:00 AM to 11:00 PM after which entry is not given.

reviews.review_heading: It provides decent placements every year but not much improvement. Faculty & curriculum are average.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in the college building are pretty basic. There are projectors and blackboards in all the classrooms. We have Wi-Fi throughout the college building and the speed is pretty decent. The food served in the mess is terrible, and sports facilities are not provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: No proper Campus due to temporary campus
reviews.review_text: There is no proper infrastructure because we were in temporary campus currently but in few months we will back to permanent campus. There will be good infrastructure because of permanent campus here only. One academic building is there for entire college due to that we lack with infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Good coding culture and competitive culture, both in CP and DEV.
reviews.review_text: Mess food is okay. Wi-Fi is available but that too doesn't work. If it does, then it's speed is very slow. There is no medical facility and our college doesn't have its own grounds. We have to go to a private field to play. Sometimes the food is good, but all days the food is below average .

reviews.review_heading: I hope upcoming New campus life is good .
reviews.review_text: IIIT Pune is operating from the temporary campus at Ambegaon Budruk, Sinhagad Institute Road, Pune 411041. The temporary campus of IIIT Pune is at a distance of 13 km from Pune Railway Station,  and 20 km from Pune Airport. It is intended that the institute will eventually move to its permanent campus, spread over 100 acres located at Nanoli Tarf Chakan near Talegaon Dabhade.

reviews.review_heading: There is no permanent campus but it is said that IITP will shift to a permanent campus in future.
reviews.review_text: The academic building is a small building (the size of a school or smaller). It's not too good but still, it's manageable because it has all the basic needs like Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, etc., but since it's a temporary campus, the hostel and all buildings are of Sinhgad College. The temporary hostel is a 5/5 because we got all the basic needs, like Wi-Fi, a mattress, a table, a chair, cupboard and most importantly, an attached bathroom and washrooms with a basin region separately. The rooms a...

reviews.review_heading: I'm not totally satisfied with a few faculty members .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and labs are available in college, and there is a library that will provide the books that are required throughout the course, so students don't need to buy any books. Sports facilities are not really good, but the college area is good, and a market is available.

reviews.review_heading: As we are currently in temporary campus with limited facilities with close to 0 sports facilities.
reviews.review_text: Currently, in 2024, I am at a temporary campus with very limited facilities. Only basic facilities are available, including normal Wi-Fi, lab classes, and not-so-extraordinary amenities. In sports, there are close to zero facilities provided by the institute.

reviews.review_heading: Completely dissatisfied with the college facilities and events.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. The infrastructure of the hostel is good, but as we do not have a permanent campus, the Institute Building is not up to the mark. A small library is also present, which does not seem like a library. The quality of food and facilities is below average. They do not even have washing machines, neither JET sprays nor bulbs. There is a canteen available, but no medical or sports facilities. However, seniors somehow manage to conduct a sporting event by contributing. We also do not...

college_info.intro:
Dr CV Raman University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech is provided in various specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Electronics and Communication, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, and others. Dr CV Raman University students are placed in top companies such as TATA, NIIT, Amazon, and others.
Dr. CV Raman University has smart classrooms and provides live lectures to students. There is a CVRU Research Centre. There is a research-oriented environment with over 70 patents available. Overall, Dr CV Raman University is one of the top universities present in India. reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Computer Application (PGDCA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Everything was good except the placements.

review_content.Placements: In our college, only a few students get placements in this course. Very few companies visit our college for recruitments. The average package offered in our course was around 3-5 LPA. Most of the students in our college go for a Masters degree. Some students get internships off-campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: In terms of facilities and infrastructure, this was a very good college. All the facilities like the library, labs, classrooms, and other amenities were of top quality. There was no hostel facility given to the students. In the canteen of the college, various food items were served which were of good quality.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: providing quality education and promoting research and innovation in diverse fields.

review_content.Placements: Ensure the university is recognized and accredited by relevant education authorities. Dr. CV Raman University provides placement assistance to its students through its dedicated placement cell. For BCA, the highest package Dr. CV Raman University offered is 3LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: It typically provides facilities such as libraries, laboratories, hostels, and sports facilities to support students' academic and extracurricular activities. Free Wi-Fi is available in college, and canteen quality food is available. Sports like kabaddi are played in Khelo India, joined in summer 2023.

overview_faqs.question: Is Dr. C.V. Raman University worth all the hype?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Dr. C.V. Raman University Bilaspur is worth all the hype as it is recognised as the best private university in Chhattisgarh. Dr. C.V. Raman University, also known as CVRU Bilaspur, is approved by the AICTE, NCTE, PCI, and BCI. Further, the university is also a member of the Association of Indian Universities (AIU).

review_summary.college_name: Dr CV Raman University Bilaspur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college has value for money, but hostel food is not good.

content.Placements: My course is B.Sc. Biotechnology and I am currently in my 5th semester out of 6 semesters. I have heard that placements are good because companies approach the university, and we are notified through the WhatsApp group of our classes that this company is recruiting a certain number of students for their organisations.
content.Infrastructure: I have been staying in the campus hostel for 2 years, and this is my 3rd year. Food is worse than anything I have eaten in my lifetime. The food in the hostel mess is very bad and tasteless. Everything is okay, but the food provided is very bad. We don’t have Wi-Fi, as the university doesn’t provide it in the classes or the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: College with good faculty and infrastructure for our course.

content.Placements: There were not many placement opportunities offered in our college for this course. Few of the students got placed at this college. Average package offered was between 3-4 LPA. Placements cell of the college was developed, but for our course, there were not many opportunities available for the students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has an average infrastructure for this course. The campus has a Physics labs and a library with all the necessary materials. Wi-Fi, canteen, hostel, parking, sports etc. facilities were also available in the college. Food in the mess and the canteen was good to eat.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Computer Application (PGDCA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Everything was good except the placements.

content.Placements: In our college, only a few students get placements in this course. Very few companies visit our college for recruitments. The average package offered in our course was around 3-5 LPA. Most of the students in our college go for a Masters degree. Some students get internships off-campus.
content.Infrastructure: In terms of facilities and infrastructure, this was a very good college. All the facilities like the library, labs, classrooms, and other amenities were of top quality. There was no hostel facility given to the students. In the canteen of the college, various food items were served which were of good quality.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: providing quality education and promoting research and innovation in diverse fields.

content.Placements: Ensure the university is recognized and accredited by relevant education authorities. Dr. CV Raman University provides placement assistance to its students through its dedicated placement cell. For BCA, the highest package Dr. CV Raman University offered is 3LPA.
content.Infrastructure: It typically provides facilities such as libraries, laboratories, hostels, and sports facilities to support students' academic and extracurricular activities. Free Wi-Fi is available in college, and canteen quality food is available. Sports like kabaddi are played in Khelo India, joined in summer 2023.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Computer Application (PGDCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dr. C.V. Raman University.

content.Placements: Placements provided in our college were not good placements with a less salary package of 2 LPA which was Rs.8,000 to Rs.9,000 per month. I do not recommend this college for students who want good placements in some reputed and big companies.
content.Infrastructure: Everything provided in our college was up to mark.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college were supportive and encouraged students well. They taught students very well. They were friendly and helpful to students in every aspect. Exams conducted in our college were hard to test the knowledge of students and gain practical knowledge. Our college focused more on practicals than theory so that students can easily write their exams with ease. The minimum pass percentage was 33%.

admission_overview.title: CVRU Bilaspur Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: CVRU admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts entrance exams such as JEE Main, CGPET, CAT, MAT, etc. for admission to specific courses. CVRU Bilaspur also accepts AJEE conducted by AISECT Group of Institutions for admission to various courses. The university offers more than 50 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. The programmes are offered in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, etc. Besides, the university also offers distance education courses via IODE.

eligibility_selection.title: CVRU Bilaspur Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: CVRU admission to the UG and PG courses is based on merit and scores in the course-specific entrance exam. The university offers regular as well as courses in distance education mode. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below are CVRU courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria: Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate

admission_process.title: CVRU Bilaspur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: CVRU admission processincludes steps such as registration, selection, counselling and fee payment. Currently, the admissions are open, and candidates can apply for the preferred course. Below are the steps to get a seat in CVRU Bilaspur:
1- CVRU Bilaspur Application Process 2025

Students meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online on official website of university. Students are first required to create a new account followed by filling out the application form. They also need to pay an application fee for admission.
2- Selection

CVRU selects candidates for most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university accepts JEE Main, CG PET, CAT, MAT, XAT, etc. for admission to specific courses. Besides, CVRU also accepts AJEE or AISECT Joint Entrance Exam for admission to BE, MBA, LLB, LLM, etc.
3- Counselling and Admission Confirmation

Once the entrance exam results are out, aspirants are offered seat in the university. Aspirants need to come for counselling and document verification. Selected candidates further need to pay aCVRU feeto confirm their seat in the university.
Check out more details in the below video:

Once selected, canddiates need to confirm their seat by paying the course fee.

faqs.question: What is the placement status of Dr. CV Raman University?
faqs.answer: A fluctuating trend was observed in the UG (3-year) and PG (2-year) placement rates recorded over the past three years (2021 to 2023). On the other hand, the placement rate for PG (1-year) courses has declined year-on-year from 2021 to 2023 and an improving trend was observed in the BTech placement rate. See the below table showcasing the Dr CV Raman University placement rate trends: Course Placement Rate (2021) Placement Rate (2022) Placement Rate (2023) UG (3-year) 36% 23% 31% BTech 40% 62% 64% UG (5-year) 21% N/A 29% PG (1-year) 38% 37% 33% PG (2-year) 38% 34% 42%

faqs.question: How is CV Raman University? What package can BSc students expect after completing the degree?
faqs.answer: Accredited by NAAC, CV Raman University is the first private university of Chhattisgarh. With a focus on deep research in the Science department, the university offers a three-year BSc programme. The programme is spread across various specialisations including Biology, Biotechnology, Mathematics, and more. The starting salary may vary from student to student depending on the choice of specialisations. Tabulated below are prospect job profiles and respective average salaries after completing a general BSc course: Job Profiles Average Annual Salary Accountant INR 3.3 LPA Numerical Analyst INR 6 LPA Biotech engineer INR 5.5 LPA Researcher INR 3.4 LPA Economist INR 11.7 LPA Statistician INR 6 LPA Note: The above-mentioned salaries are based on industry averages. However, not every student needs to start within the same range of salary. It depends on various factors such as knowledge level, skills, market demand, etc.

library.description: The University has a spacious library, stacked with more than 40,000 books, 5,000 titles, thousands of CDs, journals and reports that cover all subjects pertinent to the courses. reviews.review_heading: This college has value for money, but hostel food is not good.
reviews.review_text: I have been staying in the campus hostel for 2 years, and this is my 3rd year. Food is worse than anything I have eaten in my lifetime. The food in the hostel mess is very bad and tasteless. Everything is okay, but the food provided is very bad. We don’t have Wi-Fi, as the university doesn’t provide it in the classes or the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: College with good faculty and infrastructure for our course.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an average infrastructure for this course. The campus has a Physics labs and a library with all the necessary materials. Wi-Fi, canteen, hostel, parking, sports etc. facilities were also available in the college. Food in the mess and the canteen was good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Everything was good except the placements.
reviews.review_text: In terms of facilities and infrastructure, this was a very good college. All the facilities like the library, labs, classrooms, and other amenities were of top quality. There was no hostel facility given to the students. In the canteen of the college, various food items were served which were of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: providing quality education and promoting research and innovation in diverse fields.
reviews.review_text: It typically provides facilities such as libraries, laboratories, hostels, and sports facilities to support students' academic and extracurricular activities. Free Wi-Fi is available in college, and canteen quality food is available. Sports like kabaddi are played in Khelo India, joined in summer 2023.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. C.V. Raman University.
reviews.review_text: Everything provided in our college was up to mark.

reviews.review_heading: My college life in cv raman university.
reviews.review_text: C. v raman has one of the most beautiful infrastructure in Chhattisgarh. Each course or departments has its separate buildings. Hostel facility of cv raman is very good and affordable. There are 100 rooms in a hostel and there are 3 hostlers in each room. Hostel provides you with one table, chair, beds and almirah. Mess facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is best for everyone.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are very nice and relevant like Wi-Fi, Labs, Classrooms, Library, smart classrooms and cafeteria etc. The quality of our hostel is very nice and also affordable. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is above average.

reviews.review_heading: My college life in cv raman university.
reviews.review_text: One of the most beautiful campus in Chhattisgarh is cv ranam. There are many courses in cv ranam university and each course has its separate building. Hostel facility is aslo very good as the provide you with B.Ed table, chair and one almira. There are total 100 rooms in a hostel and there are only 3 students in each room. Medical, sports room, mess etc. All facilities are available in cv ranam.

reviews.review_heading: This college gave me an experience that resulted into a person that made me like myself.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi connection is better than average, the labs have well functioned, the classroom is student-friendly, and the best experience. Mess food quality is average & four times a week non-veg is served. And quantity is pretty sufficient, sports and games are available to all. And can be enrolled accordingly.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty, facilities, and good placement options.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and there is a good canteen. We have good medical facilities and a good opportunity for sports. The library is very well organised and well-equipped with many books, and also the food provide by the canteen needs to be improved but overall those are also good for health.

reviews.review_heading: The college always provides placements but it also depends on your scores.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. It had its library, sports center, and computer labs, and also a technological equipment lab. There were many courses that our college offered. You can take admission in any of them of your choice and enjoy the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it was not a good experience.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a good infrastructure. All lab equipment was available. Every book was available in the library. It had a good canteen with good hygiene. Hostel facilities were good and rooms were quite big for the accommodation of 2 students. Every department had its well-equipped labs.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and I suggest students to opt for our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, washrooms, auditorium, restroom, staff room, principal office, playground, dance room, chemistry lab, physics lab, biology lab, basketball court and many more. The food served here is very good. A canteen, medical facilities, etc., available here are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for BBA course with the low fee structure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility was good with clean with a hygienic environment. Proper maintenance of college and hostel were done. Medical facilities are quite good. Labs and library were available in the college in different departments. Classrooms were available in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with good placements.
reviews.review_text:
The campus of CVRU was awesome. The entire campus was Wi-Fi enabled with outstanding high-speed. A well-equipped library was available and had enough books for students. Hostels were new, but they didn't have any air conditioners. Water was available 24x7, and the bathroom conditions were good. Hostel was very good for students. Classrooms and labs were also good. All the essentials were available in the labs.
.

paragraphs: The Fee structure for an MBA at Dr. C.V. Raman University  Dr. C.V. Raman University offers M.Tech., MBA, and PGDBM as part of its postgraduate program. The minimum eligibility required for the courses is a graduation in a relevant field. CVRU CET is applicable to all the courses. For M.Tech, candidates with valid GATE scores will also be considered for admission. In the case of MBA and PGDBM, candidates with valid MAT or CAT will also be considered.
Total Programme fee INR 59800/-
Exams fee per year INR 2000/-

The CVRU Bilaspur offers CG scholarship programmes to help students with financial aid so they can finish their education and achieve their ambitions. The following are the many CG Scholarship programmes that CVRU offers:
Scholarship for underprivileged

Candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC community can apply for this scholarship programme if the annual income is below INR 1 Lacs for OBC or it is below INR 2 Lacs for SC/ST. The candidates will be required to submit a caste certificate and income certificate duly signed by the tahsildar.
Scholarship for Meritorious

Candidates who have secured 85% or above marks in SSC/HSC examination can apply for this scholarship program. The scholarship will be given either in bulk or in parts at the beginning of every term. Special concessions will also be provided to the candidates hailing from economically backward communities.
Scholarship programme for ME/MTech
To promote post-graduation education in India, INR 8000/- will be granted by MHRD to GATE-qualified students to afford higher education and meet the demand for thesis work.
Notice acandidates can avail of only one kind of scholarship programme by producing the necessary documents along with the scholarship form.
Yes, BSc students are offered various scholarships at CV Raman University. These scholarships cater to meritorious and in-need students. Mentioned below are details about these scholarships:
Merit-based: Candidates who have secured 85% or above marks in the SSC/HSC examination can apply for this scholarship programme
Category-based:
- Candidates belonging to the SC/ST community and family income of less than INR 2 lakh.
- Candidates belonging to the OBC community and family income of less than INR 1 lakh.
- The candidates will be required to submit a caste certificate and income certificate duly signed by the tahsildar.

overview_faqs.answer: Nehru Institute of Engineering and Technology is a reputed institute for B.Tech, MCA, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Nehru Institute of Engineering and Technology has a review rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.9 on campuslife, 3.7 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review about my college infrastructure.

content.Placements: 80% of the students are placed in the college campuses. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA in the college campuses. They give top roles in their company and give the opportunity to prove themselves. Top recruiting companies visit here.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are available and in good condition in the college infrastructure. The facilities of Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available in the college. Hostel food is good. The quality is average, and the quantity is high in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Placement and Infrastructure.

content.Placements: 80% of the students in my course are placed through the college. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Top companies visited our college for placements, and students got jobs. Internships are provided by the college.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of the engineering college are good. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are available in the college. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is good, and the hostel food is average but available in good quantity. Medical facilities are provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is the college placement review.

content.Placements: 74% of the students are placed in the course. The highest package of the course is 7 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies visited the course and provided the opportunity to work with them.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are available on our college campus, and the department facilities are also available in the college. The hostel facilities and food are very good, and medical facilities are also available in the hostel. The hostel food is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of my college placements and infrastructure.

content.Placements: 80% of students get placed in our course. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Top companies visit our college for placements. Top roles are offered in our course. IIT Madras internships are offered in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is peaceful and good. There is a gym and a playground. The department has well-advanced technology.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. Their teaching quality is very good. There are experienced faculty members in this course. The course curriculum is relevant, and it makes students industry-ready. Semester exams in this college are good. Faculty members are very friendly to all students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure, knowledgeable faculty, and good placements.

content.Placements: 80% of students got placed in our Mechatronics course. Our course is the best in the current generation for future engineers. The highest salary offered is 1 per month, and the lowest salary is Rs. 30,000 per month. Many companies visit the college to hire Mechatronics course students. 80% of students got internships in my course. Some multinational companies visit the college and hire many students from this course.
content.Infrastructure: Nehru Institute of Engineering and Technology is a good college, and Mechatronics is the best course. Classrooms are good, and the library is awesome. The hostel facilities are the worst. The food is the worst. Sports and games are average. The food is average in the hostel.

Some of the accepted entrance tests include GATE, CEETA, and TANCET, and more. For merit-based admissions, scores in last qualifying exam are the criteria. reviews.review_heading: Review about my college infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are available and in good condition in the college infrastructure. The facilities of Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available in the college. Hostel food is good. The quality is average, and the quantity is high in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Placement and Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the engineering college are good. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are available in the college. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is good, and the hostel food is average but available in good quantity. Medical facilities are provided.

reviews.review_heading: This is the college placement review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available on our college campus, and the department facilities are also available in the college. The hostel facilities and food are very good, and medical facilities are also available in the hostel. The hostel food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my college placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is peaceful and good. There is a gym and a playground. The department has well-advanced technology.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, knowledgeable faculty, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Nehru Institute of Engineering and Technology is a good college, and Mechatronics is the best course. Classrooms are good, and the library is awesome. The hostel facilities are the worst. The food is the worst. Sports and games are average. The food is average in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: About the good placement and experienced faculty.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in our course, like Wi-Fi, labs, library, and classrooms. It is good for the value of money, and the food is okay in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am full satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were excellent, and Wi-Fi with high-speed internet was available. The library was spectacular. Hostel infrastructure was okay. Mess food was also good. Everyone here is friendly. More exposure to people, enjoyment in college life, and overall a positive experience.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely happy to join this college.
reviews.review_text: My college has good infrastructure but a Wi-Fi connection is not available for all the students. The hostel is okay the hostel's food is not that good but you can adjust to it. The college gives more importance to sports and other extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: The College is Good and Satisfying.
reviews.review_text:
Every classroom contains LED projectors, and installations of LED TVs are going for some classes. Sufficient space is provided, as about 70 students can be accommodated in a class.
Every course has specified labs for their purpose, and proper instruments are installed.
There is a separate building for the library, which contains a huge number of books.

reviews.review_heading: After Covid, placements are very good in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the building is good. Rooms are comfortable. Beds are provided. Our classrooms are very good than other colleges. There are extraordinary classrooms that are used for digital learning. It is provided for students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good, especially the library, which is a great place to read a lot of books. It has three floors. Classrooms are well-equipped with smart boards, and faculty members teach using practical methods. Hostel mess food is average. There are three canteens, and the food is okay. The college gives importance to sports and other activities.

reviews.review_heading: Good Placements and Good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: I am a Hosteller. Hostel rooms are good. Wi-Fi will be provided in the hostel. Upma, Dosa, Chapati, Idly, Tea will be provided as Morning Tiffin. A Good Price Will Be Provided for Lunch. Evening snacks will be provided. At night, they provide poor, dosa, or a price as dinner. Weekly two times they serve non-veg. Tastes are decent. Canteen foods are good. Prices are minimum.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, and labs have many equipments. The college has one cafeteria, two food courts, and one stationary shop. The food in food courts is also good. Lab faculty members are helpful, and we can freely experiment without any disturbance. Lab faculty members are concerned about our safety.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text:
We have a library with great books.
We have a good Wi-Fi connection. We have all the specified instruments in the lab. Quality food and a very clean environment are there in my hostel. In our college week, one-time games are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, infrastructure and better placements.
reviews.review_text: We have two canteens on our campus, and in the entrance there is a place called Hut, which is lovely. There are two main blocks in our college, known as Ramanujan Block and Abdul Kalam Block. Restrooms are neat, and hostel food is somehow better; you can prefer the outer hostel.

highlights.summary:
The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Below are a few more updates related to the Geethanjali College of Engineering and Technology:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Geethanjali College of Engineering and Technology offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in offline mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Geethanjali College of Engineering and Technology offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Geethanjali College of Engineering and Technology fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,05,000 to 4,80,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: There is nice infrastructure in college. It looks really neat, clean, and has good placements.

review_content.Placements: From every branch atleast 6-10 students will be placed according to luck. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. DAZN and Qubits are the recruiting companies. The students who get placed in companies have 3 or 6 months internship policy. Students will be getting paid internships. The roles offered are software engineer and data analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is protected with passwords but free Wi-Fi runs very slowly. There is no proper signal for free Wi-Fi. Labs are good, mostly all the computers will be in working condition. Coming to library, most of the library will be filled with students. The food in the canteen is good enough but a little bit costly than outside. Sports and game facilities are the worst.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: College environment is good.

review_content.Placements: 76 percent of students get placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Accenture Google and Microsoft. 70 percent of students got internship. The top roles are project manager software developer and database administrator.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very good. The classrooms look very beautiful with AC. The computer labs are good with high speed internet connectivity. We have a library for books. We have a tennis court. The hotel facilities are good. The canteen is also available. Our college is providing a free Wi-Fi facility.

review_summary.college_name: Geethanjali College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Beginning of a new journey.

content.Placements: Amazon, Accenture, and Autodesk are the top companies recruiting on college campus. The highest package is 46 LPA, and a few companies are also recruiting for a data analyst. There are 5-6 rounds of interviews, and the college gives training to students according to the in-demand skills in the market.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good technology and requirements for students to get advanced knowledge. The college is providing many facilities and opportunities for interested students to showcase their talents and encourage them. College itself conducts hackathons and other events to showcase the talent. In the college library, there is a really good collection of books that helps students learn and acquire knowledge, so that we gain a comprehensive understanding of the subject.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Recently these days, college is improving its placements.

content.Placements: College is good for engineering. But the locality is quite poor. Regarding college and placements, it is a good college. In 2024, 1400+ students are placed. The highest package is about 54 LPA. During 3rd year itself, placements are started. You can get even more internships.
content.Infrastructure: Campus hostel is very good. But it is overpriced, which is about 120,000/annum. Food is very good in campus hostel. You can also find private hostels near college, and its fee structure is about 5k to 6.5,000 nearly. You can find options in this range. College is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: There is nice infrastructure in college. It looks really neat, clean, and has good placements.

content.Placements: From every branch atleast 6-10 students will be placed according to luck. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. DAZN and Qubits are the recruiting companies. The students who get placed in companies have 3 or 6 months internship policy. Students will be getting paid internships. The roles offered are software engineer and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is protected with passwords but free Wi-Fi runs very slowly. There is no proper signal for free Wi-Fi. Labs are good, mostly all the computers will be in working condition. Coming to library, most of the library will be filled with students. The food in the canteen is good enough but a little bit costly than outside. Sports and game facilities are the worst.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College environment is good.

content.Placements: 76 percent of students get placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Accenture Google and Microsoft. 70 percent of students got internship. The top roles are project manager software developer and database administrator.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very good. The classrooms look very beautiful with AC. The computer labs are good with high speed internet connectivity. We have a library for books. We have a tennis court. The hotel facilities are good. The canteen is also available. Our college is providing a free Wi-Fi facility.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our awesome infrastructure can attract students and facilities, and that's good.

content.Placements: 60 percent will be placed, but they'll only show the positive results and hide the negative results. The highest package is 45 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. Mostly, startups are recruiting. Only 2 students got from our section as of now in Mistral and Specktra systems.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs are good, sometimes we get a signal, sometimes we may not. But if we get them, it will be so that they can't even imagine. Though the college hostel has recently opened, we didn't know much about the hostel, but we heard that it is luxurious, and the fees are high.

description: Geethanjali College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Geethanjali College of Engineering and Technology TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 13591 and 42748 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing ran

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 13591, 14493 and 15491, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Geethanjali College of Engineering and Technology. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Geethanjali College of Engineering and Technology MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 8473. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 10697, and the 2023 cutoff was 10187 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

College itself conducts hackathons and other events to showcase the talent. In the college library, there is a really good collection of books that helps students learn and acquire knowledge, so that we gain a comprehensive understanding of the subject.

reviews.review_heading: College environment is good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. The classrooms look very beautiful with AC. The computer labs are good with high speed internet connectivity. We have a library for books. We have a tennis court. The hotel facilities are good. The canteen is also available. Our college is providing a free Wi-Fi facility.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs are good, sometimes we get a signal, sometimes we may not. But if we get them, it will be so that they can't even imagine. Though the college hostel has recently opened, we didn't know much about the hostel, but we heard that it is luxurious, and the fees are high.

reviews.review_heading: Great college and placement.
reviews.review_text: There are many great facilities available at the college. It has great infrastructure and lush green campus. Our future is in their hands. It has great internet connectivity. We have large classrooms. Many great scholars' books are there in library. Many different varieties of food are available in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements and infrastructure, good for AIML.
reviews.review_text: In our Geethanjali College for AIML branch, there is a separate block, which is block-5. This consists of a larger number of classrooms, including different labs for different courses. A big library that contains all types of books that an engineering student requires.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Geethanjali College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very good infrastructure, including a clean and well-maintained campus, canteen, medical facilities, and hostels. Hostels are strict but provide quality food. The major downside is the lack of sports facilities, which is a letdown for students like me who are passionate about sports.

reviews.review_heading: Overall good in studies and cultural activities. Faculty is also good.
reviews.review_text: nfrastructure of the college is good. College is small but looks very clean. Blocks are very pleasant and good. The internet connection is actually poor, no signal in the college. Hostels are pretty good and safe. Medical facilities are good, they are always available. The canteen is small, but you can get whatever you need. Sports are not good, no ground and no equipment. Sports are very bad.

reviews.review_heading: Decent infrastructure and placements, but average faculty and outdated curriculum.
reviews.review_text: There are plenty of classrooms in our college. Our college is 5 blocks with 5 floors, including the ground floor. There are sufficient labs according to their course, with a good Wi-Fi facility. In our college, there is a lift also. The food in the canteen also tastes good.

reviews.review_heading: Gist of GCET Good and bands.
reviews.review_text: There are sufficient labs for all sections with a good Wi-Fi network. There are 5 blocks with each 4 floors, including the ground floor. The availability of classrooms is sufficient. There is a library with all the required textbooks related to B.Tech. The food in the canteen was good.

reviews.review_heading: The place where you can show what you are and develop your skills and experience.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is too good, with neat and sufficient classrooms and labs. Our library is very big; all the books we want are found there. Our college is well known for its greenery. Our canteen meals are average in taste. But tea and fruit juices are very tasty and good. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Glance of GECT - Pros and cons of the college.
reviews.review_text: The labs are pretty good. Classrooms are nice, and almost every class has a digital board. The library has plenty of books. As I am staying outside (not in the campus hostel), I don't know very much about the campus hostel. My classmates told me it's good. The food in the canteen is good. There is a dispensary room in our 1st-year block, but I have no idea about the dispensary in other blocks. Ragging isn't encouraged in our college. It is a punishable offense, and the students are fined up to 1...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the infrastructure, faculty, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus gives a healthy vibe for students, and education is conveyed properly by the faculty. The labs have efficient tools for the experiments. The library also provides various books that are helpful for self-study. The blocks are kept clean.

reviews.review_heading: I would not say excellent but a very good college for students for peaceful study with good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Very good environment and not good at sports, but overall it is good in the canteen, medical, and infrastructure. There is no space for sports, but the hostel is very good and very strict too, and they provide good quality food. Overall, very good about all of these except sports because I am a sports person.

content.Placements: I was in batch 2019-2022. The infrastructure of the college is good, and the facility members are also helpful to the student. The top companies that visit this college campus are LG, whirlpool, airtel, etc. The highest salary package offered is 10LPA, and the average package offered is 4 to 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite acceptable for the fee we paid. The hostel facility at this college is an average one, but it's good because of the hostel friends. Wi-Fi is available and is always open for students. The canteen provides a good food menu according to the day. The medical and sports facilities are somewhat good for the students of this college.

paragraphs: Shriram Institute of Technology (SRIT) admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Shriram Institute of Technology (SRIT)offers courses at UG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech and After 10th Diploma. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,44,800. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. After 10th courses are offered for 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: Story of Shriram Institute of Technology (SRIT).
reviews.review_text: Talking about infrastructure, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are good and the area of college is beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with placements and training team.
reviews.review_text: Air-conditioners are available in classrooms. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Washrooms are good. Many books are available in the library. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with good facilities. Our classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel is available near the college at walking distance. The food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: The conclusion is that our college is the best all over Jabalpur and all over MP.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the quality of the food is awesome. The size of the canteen is also too huge and the price of the food is also reasonable.

reviews.review_heading: The college of Innovation and management Science is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite acceptable for the fee we paid. The hostel facility at this college is an average one, but it's good because of the hostel friends. Wi-Fi is available and is always open for students. The canteen provides a good food menu according to the day. The medical and sports facilities are somewhat good for the students of this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shriram Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. A huge playground is present for the students to play sports. The library has every kind of books so that we can gain knowledge related to other fields as well.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shriram Institute of Technology (SRIT).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is modern. The ground is spread over 4-acres. The library has 5-6 rooms with thousands of books available in each room. There is an Indian coffee house, which is the top-most in Jabalpur.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has well developed infrastructure so that the education will be easier.
reviews.review_text: The college has libraries, workshops, garden, etc. The library has a huge variety of books and newspapers. Workshop building is of many floors. The students can work their under the guidelines of faculty to make the work successful.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members, good infrastructure and facilities provided.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good, and the classes were well arranged. All the equipment and facilities were in a good working state. The canteen was good, clean and satisfactory. I didn't stay in the hostel, but it was good as per colleagues. The mess in the hostel was satisfactory, which serves good food for students.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Science:

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 392 students were admitted at Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Science and 291 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 291 students 281 were placed with median salary of INR 360000 and 2 students opted for higher studies. A total of 369 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Scienceand 216 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 216 students 210 were placed with median salary of INR 375000 and 6 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 65 students were admitted at Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Science and 31 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 31 students 10 were placed with median salary of INR 300000. A total of 40 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Scienceand 31 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 31 students 12 were placed with median salary of INR 360000.

faqs.answer: A:    The median salary granted to students upon a successful placement from the Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Science is INR 1.95 LPA, indicating the institution's commitment to fostering prosperous career beginnings, with graduates receiving a commendable financial remuneration.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Science is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fee structure for the Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Science programmes is around INR 72,000 to 2,11,200.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Science is approximately INR 65200 - INR 231880.
faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Science?

faqs.answer: A:    Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Science is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, MCA, After 10th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Science are Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, VLSI Design.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Science?

faqs.answer: A:    Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Science provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, MCA, After 10th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM in streams such as Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, VLSI Design.
