reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Now placements are going well in our college.

review_content.Placements: 30% of students are placed in our course. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, the lowest package is 2.5 LPA, and the average package is 4.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Infosys, OPPO and Delhi TVs, etc. 50% of students got internships from our course and in Delhi TVs, and 20% of students got internships from our course and in Bimazed. Top roles offered in our course are embedded developers, hardware engineers, and software developers.
review_content.Infrastructure: Due to the increasing percentage of students, there are no classrooms for some students, so they are adjusting to labs. Wi-Fi facilities are above average in our department. Coming to the infrastructure, it looks above average. And discussing about food is okay.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: In our college, the campus placements vary from year to year.

review_content.Placements: I'm a CSE student. In our college, 75% of students will get placed, mainly in our branch. For our course, there are some top recruiting companies like Infosys, TCS, Cognizant, HCL Tech, and Synechron. Top roles offered in our course are mainly development, data analyst, and MEAN stack. The highest package in our course is 38 LPA, the average package is 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.6 LPA. 50% of students got internships from our course in companies like OPPO, VYMO, Qspiders, SIS, SkillIntern, and NXTSYNC.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a good Wi-Fi facility, but sometimes it does not work properly; the remaining times it's okay. There are E-classrooms for every branch separately. Coming to the classrooms, the infrastructure is good, and also the classrooms are cleaned neatly. The library is not only a normal library, but we also have a digital library. It is very useful for us. In our college, we have three places for food: the mess, the canteen, and Cafe Panda. Good medical facilities are also available, and they conduct the BPL cricket every year.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: For the local people my college is very good. Because we have good facilities, good faculty.

review_content.Placements: 20 percent of students are placed in my course. The highest package offered in my course is 7 LPA, the lowest is 2 LPA, and the average is 3.6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Lumen and Infosys. Only 3 percent of people got internships from my course in Lumen. Top roles offered are data analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: My department has good Wi-Fi facility and a good library. We don’t have good hostel facilities, and the food is too worst in quality. The quality of the facilities in my hostels is average, and the food available in the mess and canteen is also average. Medical facilities, sports, and games are not there in my college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: There is no proper education and no extracurricular activities.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students are placed in our course. The lowest package is 2 LPA, the highest is 8 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. Virtusa is the recruiting company. 50% of students got an internship. As a computer engineer, jobs are difficult to find in this college because there is no proper guidance.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is good but not excellent. The mess is decent, and the canteen food is good. The medical facility is available in our college. Sports activities are not available, and games are also not there.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty members are not awesome, some are top-notch, but some lecturers are the worst. They just teach the class and go. They are helpful, and they prepare students. The semester exams are easy. The course curriculum is not relevant, it does not prepare students. The semester exams are not easy, it is of a medium level. The faculty does the invigilation very strictly, so you need to study carefully.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Definitely, correct for your bright future.

review_content.Placements: In my college, there are so many roles offered. I am pursuing B.Tech final year in the stream of civil engineering. In my college, there are so many off-campus placements according to their branch. In civil engineering, the roles are offered like designer, site engineer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: In BVCITS facilities include Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. E-classrooms are also available for students. In my college, hostels are located for boys and girls in different places. It also includes food facilities like mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available in my college free of cost. Then coming to sports and games so many achievements are received with their practices. In my college, practice time is also given to improve their games to give the best.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of my campus and college.

review_content.Placements: Mostly 50% of students got placed. The highest package is 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Infosys Wipro, and Capgemini. 50% of students got internships in embedded systems, VLSI, and arduino. Top roles offered are data analyst and software developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are available in our course. Classrooms are Wi-Fi enabled. Library has number of books by different authors. Electronics labs are available with various electrical electronics equipment. Wi-Fi is provided to students. Digital classrooms, presentations, PPTs, and e-classrooms are available.

Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,10,800 - 2,11,200. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

reviews.review_heading: Now placements are going well in our college.
reviews.review_text: Due to the increasing percentage of students, there are no classrooms for some students, so they are adjusting to labs. Wi-Fi facilities are above average in our department. Coming to the infrastructure, it looks above average. And discussing about food is okay.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, the campus placements vary from year to year.
reviews.review_text: There is a good Wi-Fi facility, but sometimes it does not work properly; the remaining times it's okay. There are E-classrooms for every branch separately. Coming to the classrooms, the infrastructure is good, and also the classrooms are cleaned neatly. The library is not only a normal library, but we also have a digital library. It is very useful for us. In our college, we have three places for food: the mess, the canteen, and Cafe Panda. Good medical facilities are also available, and they con...

reviews.review_heading: For the local people my college is very good. Because we have good facilities, good faculty.
reviews.review_text: My department has good Wi-Fi facility and a good library. We don’t have good hostel facilities, and the food is too worst in quality. The quality of the facilities in my hostels is average, and the food available in the mess and canteen is also average. Medical facilities, sports, and games are not there in my college.

reviews.review_heading: There is no proper education and no extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: It is good but not excellent. The mess is decent, and the canteen food is good. The medical facility is available in our college. Sports activities are not available, and games are also not there.

reviews.review_heading: Definitely, correct for your bright future.
reviews.review_text: In BVCITS facilities include Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. E-classrooms are also available for students. In my college, hostels are located for boys and girls in different places. It also includes food facilities like mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available in my college free of cost. Then coming to sports and games so many achievements are received with their practices. In my college, practice time is also given to improve their games to give the best.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my campus and college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are available in our course. Classrooms are Wi-Fi enabled. Library has number of books by different authors. Electronics labs are available with various electrical electronics equipment. Wi-Fi is provided to students. Digital classrooms, presentations, PPTs, and e-classrooms are available.

reviews.review_heading: College life review for other students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure provided by the college for classes and cafeteria is very well-organized. Facilities for students like digital classrooms are provided for their better and good experience and better understanding. As I'm not staying in hostel, as per my hostel friends' review, the food available in mess is good quality and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: Coming to the facilities we have modern infrastructure in our college. The quality of hostels is also average. There is less number of hostlers. The quality of food is hygienic and tasty. We have good medical facilities and the sports are less in our college.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at BVCITS-Amalapuram.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college(BVCITS) is designed to support a better learning environment. It includes neat classrooms, well-equipped laboratories, a library with a wide range of technical books, and facilities for extracurricular activities. The campus is often equipped with internet connectivity all around the campus. Our college provides good quality facilities for students staying in a hostel. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is good and the prices are reasonable. There were m...

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is best for students who want to achieve success in their lives.
reviews.review_text: BVC campus is surrounded by free Wi-Fi. We practice the practical knowledge in labs which is taught in classes. The quality of the hostel is good. They provide all the best options for students.

reviews.review_heading: There is good infrastructure with qualified and experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are several types of facilities in my college like a bus within a 50 km radius, a digital library for students, etc. Tiffins like biryani and curd rice are provided in the canteen and mess at reasonable prices.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B.Tech college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. We have done every practical hands-on. Wi-Fi is also provided for computer labs and classrooms are clean and hygienic. Library infrastructure is very good with plenty of books and journals.

reviews.review_heading: My Honest Review on my B.Tech College.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by our college management in classrooms are projectors and CC cameras. And some special classrooms like E-classrooms with LED screens. Library management is good with a variety of journals and books available. Food quality is nice and in the cafeteria, food is available up to the evening which provides tiffins, tea, food, and snacks. Medical facilities include a wellness room to take rest if someone feels sick. Sports and games are conducted monthly. In our college, BVC Premi...

reviews.review_heading: Steps for future India with knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good. The maintenance of the campus and all is overall good. We have the library available with all the books required for our course completion and syllabus. Classrooms are just okay speaking about cleanliness. Labs are provided sufficiently.

reviews.review_heading: My POV on the college I am studying in.
reviews.review_text: There are no good facilities like Wi-Fi or digital classrooms, and there are no proper equipment in the lab, and the hostel is good; the food in the canteen is good to eat, and there is a medical room for any emergency. There is a cricket league conducted every year for boys, and there are no other sports for us.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: MVIT - Manakula Vinayagar Institute of Technology offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Manakula Vinayagar Institute of Technology offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for Manakula Vinayagar Institute of Technology courses range between INR 60,000 to 1,83,000.

faqs.answer: A:    MVIT - Manakula Vinayagar Institute of Technology is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at MVIT - Manakula Vinayagar Institute of Technology are Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Electrical Engineering, Food Technology, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Robotics Engineering.
faqs.question: What specializations do MVIT - Manakula Vinayagar Institute of Technology offer in their courses?

faqs.answer: A:    MVIT - Manakula Vinayagar Institute of Technology provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Electrical Engineering, Food Technology, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Robotics Engineering.

reviews_list.review_title: Manakula Vinayagar Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: Our institute has been excelling in placement activities for the past years. Students are placed in companies like TCS, Zoho, EY, and so on, with the highest package of 12.5 Lacs per annum. Our students are asked to attend both the off-campus and on-campus drives.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our institute is not only meant for engineering but also includes medical, arts, and Polytechnic students. Nearly, two to three canteens are present within our campus. A variety of foods are available in our college canteen with high quality. No need to worry about medical emergencies.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It's a hi-fi college in Pondicherry.

review_content.Placements: Manakula Vinayagar Institute of Technology is well known for its placement records. It has the highest number of placements compared to some other colleges. Nearly 200 companies recruit students from here every year. Students from other colleges also participate in our college placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: It's a very large institute that includes medical, engineering, polytechnic, and arts students. This college is renowned for its high-tech laboratories, libraries, hostels, and canteen facilities. Nearly 60+ buses are operated by this institute.

review_summary.college_name: Manakula Vinayagar Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Top-class facilities are provided in the college.

content.Placements: I have pursued B.Tech. Our course has an impressive placement record, with a significant percentage of students securing jobs in top recruiting companies. The companies not only conduct interviews but also provide jobs and internships to students. Most of my friends got placed with an above-average package, that is 10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities like a library, with a good speed Wi-Fi, a water purifier, etc. Computers in labs and Wi-Fi are also available for studies in the library. The library has a peaceful and clean environment for studying. The canteen is nice. Medical facilities for first aid are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college with good placement percentage and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Students are trained for company-based roles and then sent to a campus drive. Students are trained specifically by good, qualified trainers, who are training people based on their knowledge and skillset. There is a very big advantage to these training programs. There are flexible hours of training. Every student is scared. If we missed a class, then we can have special lectures on those topics.
content.Infrastructure: Computer labs, roots and automation lab, ECE lab, and every essential lab are there. The campus is fully enhanced with Wi-Fi facilities. Hostels are well structured with ventilation, and hostel fees are also reasonable. Hostellers are provided safety and security, and food for all 3 meals breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks. They have a timetable for the food menu. So, no food is repeated during the week. Food quality is good.

content.Placements: Our institute has been excelling in placement activities for the past years. Students are placed in companies like TCS, Zoho, EY, and so on, with the highest package of 12.5 Lacs per annum. Our students are asked to attend both the off-campus and on-campus drives.
content.Infrastructure: Our institute is not only meant for engineering but also includes medical, arts, and Polytechnic students. Nearly, two to three canteens are present within our campus. A variety of foods are available in our college canteen with high quality. No need to worry about medical emergencies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It's a hi-fi college in Pondicherry.

content.Placements: Manakula Vinayagar Institute of Technology is well known for its placement records. It has the highest number of placements compared to some other colleges. content.Infrastructure: It's a very large institute that includes medical, engineering, polytechnic, and arts students. This college is renowned for its high-tech laboratories, libraries, hostels, and canteen facilities. Nearly 60+ buses are operated by this institute.

faqs.answer:
A:    SITS - Sinhgad Institute of Technology and Science has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed Bachelor Degree in the relevant field from AICTE or Central or State Government approved institutions or equivalent, with above mentioned marks (at least 45% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and persons with disability belonging to Maharashtra State only).
For sponsored candidates, candidate must have minimum of two years of fulltime work experience in a registered firm/ company/industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.B.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the SITS - Sinhgad Institute of Technology and Science JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

Sinhgad Institute of Technology and Science MHT CET Cutoff 2024 was concluded for admission to the BE course. The cutoff was concluded across multiple specialisations in the BE course. Sinhgad Institute of Technology and Science MHT CET cutoff 2025 will be published following the announcement of the MHT CET 2025 result. In the meantime, candidates seeking admission to Sinhgad Institute of Technology and Science can check the previous three years' category-wise cutoff by clicking the links below:

SITS - Sinhgad Institute of Technology and Science cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 151378 and 326387 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 151378, B.E. in Computer Engineering (First Shift) turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 130017.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 151378.

Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the SITS - Sinhgad Institute of Technology and Science B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 51.57 and 88.5, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 88.5. SITS - Sinhgad Institute of Technology and Science MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 88.5. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 89.26 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at SITS - Sinhgad Institute of Technology and Science for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

hostel.description:
Separate wing for the foreign student in both boys and girls hostels with additional facilities for cooking and washing
Hostels have fully furnished rooms, TV, secured Wi-Fi, dining hall, sufficient number of toilets, furniture and recreation area

library.description:
The central library is enriched by 46500 books with 12000 titles of various books of all disciplines of Engineering, Management and Sciences. Along with 5000 reference books, it also has 207 national/ international periodicals and journals. The library also possesses 1300 CDs as offline databases. 
A dedicated six storey building with huge reading halls and modern amenities is allotted to the library facilities of the campus and the central library is open for 24 hours on all days in a year with the seating capacity of more than 3500.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SITS - Sinhgad Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: Course is Computer Engineering, and the hostel facility is available with a fee of Rs. 72, 000. Hostel is good. College provides the best meal facilities at the hostel. College hostel food and data centers are good. Canteen food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty and relevant curriculum, good teaching quality and poor mess food.
reviews.review_text: The IT department has functional labs with PCs, though the processors are slow, and reliable Wi-Fi. The library is excellent, while classrooms are average. Hostel facilities include good Wi-Fi and regular room cleaning, but the mess food quality is poor. Medical facilities are very good. Sports and games facilities are basic.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the environment in the college is good.
reviews.review_text: The department will provide you with a good range of Wi-Fi and LAN connectivity, labs, classrooms, and a reading room. Even the hostel has a reading room for students during the exam period. Hostel facilities are good, but the mess is not very healthy for students who come from other parts of Maharashtra.

reviews.review_heading: The placements, hostel, and mess are not good in the college. Only the teaching faculty is good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is very good but some issues are present including no Wi-Fi for the entire year, lack of water, etc. The hostel warden is very strict. There is a high class security in the college. The emergency services team is also available 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Everything about this college is perfect with good placements and well experienced staff.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very awesome. There are 4 sharing rooms which are cleaned well with a big hall and attached toilets and bathrooms. Well developed classes with e learning are available for our course. There are good equipments provided for different branches.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the Experience with the college is too good.
reviews.review_text: So basically the Hostel and college Buildings are too Clean and Big. The Facilities provides by college hostel is like Wi-Fi and also cleanliness. Also, a gym is available. Talking about the mess of hostel is good, The food provided by mess is of good Quality and clean. If Any student got Injured or have some medical emergency then, the college have ambulance and urgent Medical service.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides a hot water facility and a cold water facility. Water is available 24X7 in the hostel. The hostel rooms are cleaned 2 times a day. Around 4 students can stay in a single room. Each hostel room has a bed, a table, a chair, etc. Students don't like to say in the hostel. The warden is not good. The timing of hot water is not accurate sometimes. Water comes hot in the morning and sometimes late at night. Washrooms are not good. If we complain about it, we won't get a proper respo...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers and provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college and hostel. The hostel provides medical facilities. The food served in the canteen and mess is good. Our college provides facilities like water purifiers, practical labs, etc. Many facilities are available in our college. The campus is clean. It has a good environment.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members here are helpful in all activities. Its placement cell is good.
reviews.review_text: There is a huge library at the college that has different types of books. There are separate labs for different departments, which contain many instruments. Lab assistants are also very helpful. There are many Wi-Fi networks, including all departments.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely not satisfied because of the faculty members behaviour.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is good but hot water does not come to the rooms. We have to go to the water heater and collect the water. The mess of the college is very the worst. The food quality is very low quality and no hygiene is maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for an engineering degree.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Hostel facilities are excellent. The working staff in the hostel is also good. Hostel rooms are cleaned every Sunday. Overall, the hostel service is good. Mess is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure of the college is too good for studies.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is too good for studies and environment is good and library is too good. Wi-Fi is there on every floor. Lab is there in every room. Classroom is too big. Library is big for study purposes. Hostel is good, medical is also there.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college and has the best and most experienced faculty members and non-teaching staff.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a library with a Wi-Fi service and has various books, magazines and many other informative and academics related books. Classrooms are well-designed and equipped with e-learning projectors and white and green boards. Every department has its Wi-Fi and lab services. The food served in the mess is not good. Our college has various indoor and outdoor sports courts.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SITS - Sinhgad Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are well-maintained on campus. This college has a library and the study room is very calm. Our environment is also good. Laboratories are good. Wi-Fi is enabled for official work and study-related projects. In every computer laboratory, there is a LAN facility for internet access.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the quality of teaching and the curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Quality of food is not so good and the nutritious value of the food is also poor but hostels are neat and clean. You will get free Wi-Fi in college hostel but with the little lesser speed around <1 Mbps.

admission_overview.college_name: Rohini College of Engineering and Technology Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_process.title: Rohini College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Rohini College of Engineering and Technology admission 2025is entrance-based. The college offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and research programmes in the fields of Engineering, Management, Computer Application, etc. To get admission toRohini College of Engineering and Technology, one must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The admission can be done through the Tamilnadu government counselling quota and management quota. Also known asRCET, the college offers courses in affiliation withAnna University. Interested candidates can read the following article to learn all about the courses offered at the college and their respective admission criteria.

RCET course admissionsare based on merit/ entrance exam scores. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularRohini College of Engineering and Technology courses:

Rohini College of Engineering and Technology admission process includes registration for the entrance exam, TNEA counselling, TANCET score etc. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in RCET:
STEP 1: Application Process
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. Candidates must pay the application fee as per respective courses.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Students will be selected based on Merit + TNEA counselling, GATE, CEETA and TANCET, TANCET MBA, MAT, and CAT scores as per respective courses. Additionally, clearing the minimum eligibility criteria as specified by the college. Students can apply either via the Tamil Nadu government counselling quota or management quota.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission for BTech course at Rohini College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, direct admission for the BTech course at Rohini College of Engineering and Technology is possible through the Management quota. However, students must complete Class 12 with 40%-45% aggregate to enroll for BTech course at RCET. The admission criteria for the course are merit + TNEA counselling. faqs.question: How to get admission in Rohini College of Engineering and Technology for MTech?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to the M.Tech programme at Rohini College of Engineering and Technology, must meet the eligibility criteria established by the college. Those who meet the eligibility criteria can apply by filling out the application form through university’s official website by paying the required registration fee. Candidates willing to take admission to the M.Tech programme at RCET must possess a graduation with a 50% aggregate.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Rohini College of Engineering and Technology admission?
faqs.answer: In order to enroll for admission to various courses at  Rohini College of Engineering and Technology, candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the college. The university offers courses, such as BE, BTech, ME, MCA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the college also offers doctorate and diploma courses.Students can check course-wise eligibility from the table presented below:Course NameEligibilityBE/BTechClass 12 with 40%-45% aggregateMEGraduationMBAGraduation with 50% aggregateMCAGraduation with 45% aggregatePhD in Mechanical EngineeringPost Graduation

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Rohini College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: A pass in bachelor’s degree or Class 12 with pre-defined aggregate is required to apply for courses at Rohini College of Engineering and Technology. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at later stages of admission. Apart from fulfiling the qualifications, candidates also need to pass merit + TNEA counselling, GATE, CEETA, TANCET, TANCET MBA, MAT, CAT as per respective courses.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Rohini College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: To get admission into Rohini College of Engineering and Technology (RCET), students need to first fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme. Those who meet the admission criteria can then apply for the course of choice by filling out the online application. The college selects students either through Tamil Nadu government's counselling or management quota. Candidates joining through the state-level counselling need to participate in TNEA counselling. Additionally, students need to provide valid score obtained in accepted entrance tests, such as CEETA, TANCET, etc.

faqs.question: Can I join Rohini College of Engineering and Technology directly?
faqs.answer: Yes, one can join Rohini College of Engineering and Technology directly via the management quota. The college reserves a certain amount of seats for those who are applying under the management quota. However, there still are certain eligibility requirements that the candidates must fulfil to get a seat into the college. For any queries or more information, students may connect with the admission help desk of the college.

placement_data.title: Rohini College of Engineering and Technology Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The College has a Department of Training and Placement that has very active linkages and collaborations with industry. The Centre helps students in pursuing their career interests and also assists employers in achieving their hiring goals. The Centre provides value-added services like personal interview, analytical, quantitative, reasoning, mock tests, and team spirit and enterprise dynamics as part of their preplacement training.

During the 2024 recruitment drive, over 1000 placements were offered, and the overall placement rate stood at 96.50% . The ECE department recorded the highest placement percentage of 98.40% . The highest package offered to students was INR 15 LPA . Additionally the average package stood at INR 3.40 LPA.

library.description: Rohini College has Central Library which provide information services and access to bibliographic and full text digital and printed resources to support the scholarly and informational needs. Our library has an excellent ambiance to read in tranquil. It is spacious and classified into various sections which are labelled accordingly. It plays a vital role in acquisition, organization and dissemination of knowledge. It is well equipped with 5000+ books transmitting knowledge in 5 different branches of engineering besides competitive, fantasy, motivational and other general books.It continuously promotes several national, international journals, magazines and reference books and has a high-speed internet connectivity for e-library with modern facilities and resources in the form of CD-ROMs, On-line databases, books, e-journals, patents, e-standards, thesis, reports, monographs.

reviews.review_text: The facilities in this college are of good quality. The college has furnished classrooms with digital boards and air conditioning. Wi-Fi is available on campus for students. The labs are equipped with proper computer systems for coding practice. A canteen facility is also available, offering good food.

reviews.review_text: There is a large stadium present within our college campus. Our students have won 20+ trophies from university tournaments. There is a specific menu to be followed every day. There is a big, spacious library on our campus for research and studying.

The foods available at our canteen and hostel mess are very tasty, and they are acceptable to eat. We are asked to concentrate on our interests in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Rohini college of engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was excellent: air-conditioned classrooms with experienced faculty members. Apart from that, it was an environmentally friendly organization. They plant saplings once a month, and it was a hygienic campus where food of high quality, tasty to eat, is served.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Kanyakumari District.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our college has good environment and atmosphere. All classrooms are huge. We have lab facilities. The food served in our college is good. All subject-related books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college for Kanyakumari and Tirunelveli surrounded students.
reviews.review_text: I'm not a hosteller in my college but my friends are used to coming from the hostel. The infrastructure is nice and the food is tasty most of the time. And the food is always available for the hostellers they have the same canteen for day scholars. Not much bad reviews about the hostel in my college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure. Its location and facilities are up to the mark.
reviews.review_text: It has the best infrastructure in Kanyakumari. It offers Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a centralised library, a cafeteria, a grand arena, a clock tower, various blocks, a store, a gym, separate hostels for girls and boys, mess halls, sports, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and excellent faculty members.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have very good laboratories. Our college provides a good environment to learn and involve in sports activities allowing us to participate in all other cultural activities, etc.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college in our district.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi is available on our campus. Laboratories, classrooms, and libraries are very clean and effective. The library has several books. Lots of author books are available in our college, and the laboratories are very secure and skilled laboratory assistants are there in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Very much satisfied with the faculty, placements, infrastructure, and transport facilities.
reviews.review_text: Rohini College is the only best college in Nagercoil and Kanyakumari area. This is a very new college when compared to other colleges in Kanyakumari, so the infrastructure is very modernised. The college is providing free Wi-Fi facility to all the students on the campus. Apart from that, they have four separate rooms only for medical facilities, and there is a doctor appointed who is available 24 hours. Rohini College has a basketball court, a volleyball court, and 200-metres and 400-metre runni...

reviews.review_heading: The college provides excellent facilities, faculty members, infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Rohini is the only engineering college in Kanyakumari which is providing free Wi-Fi facility for students throughout the campus. We have big libraries with more than 75,000 books. Apart from this, the college has provided excellent transportation facilities and canteens, etc. Rohini College has a small medical store with first-aid on the campus. A very big multi-speciality hospital is available near our college. They provide separate hostels for boys and girls. Security guards are available to w...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, but management makes fake promises and advertisements.

All politicians have their engineering college. This college was started in 2013, so the infrastructure classrooms are in good condition, they also provide the Wi-Fi facility to the students and collected fee for tha...

reviews.review_heading: Compared to other colleges in Kanniyakumari, our college is good.
reviews.review_text: We have good college infrastructure. The hostel food is average. Our labs are well-equipped, and the canteen offers satisfactory food. We have good medical facilities and drinking water. The college provides high-level sports training and opportunities. However, the mess food has been quite poor for the hostellers.

reviews.review_heading: Top-notch infrastructure and facilities.

Labs and library are super well-equipped. Everything is so clean and well-maintained. The hostels feel really safe and home-like.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college and the placements we study.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are okay. Earlier, many companies were coming to the campus, but now the number has reduced a little. The highest package offered was around 30 LPA, the minimum package is mostly around 2 LPA, and the average package comes to nearly 5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Accenture, Wipro, and Cognizant have come earlier, so there are chances if we work properly. I do not know many details about different job roles, but mostly they are technical and branch-related. Around 50 to 60 percent of students usually get placed before completing their graduation.

admission_process.title: Methodist College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Methodist College admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Methodist College considers scores in GATE, TS EAMCET, and TS PGECET for admission to specific courses.Methodist Collegeoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,80,000 - 3,12,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,00,000 - 1,50,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

cut_off.college_name: Methodist College Cutoff 2025: Check TS ICET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Methodist College cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Methodist College TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 30353 and 68692 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing rank for the same stood at 25123. For

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 30353, 31091 and 39436, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Methodist College. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Methodist College MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 16207. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 7982, and the 2023 cutoff was 13278 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.
Check the table below to know the year, round, category and quota-wise cutoff.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college and the placements we study.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is also good. The college has Wi-Fi in every block and on every floor, so network problems are not there most of the time, but sometimes the internet becomes slow. Classrooms are big and have smart TVs, so teaching is mostly done using presentations or PPTs. The library is spacious, many books are available, and we can sit and study there comfortably. The college also conducts many clubs, workshops, and some outdoor sessions.

reviews.review_heading: All good facilities, faculty, and placements.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure is provided in our college, including all books, a projector to explain labs, and all materials that are required. All good food is kept in a hostel that is neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, great support, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very well-maintained. All classrooms are equipped with smart boards and projectors. The digital labs are upgraded with the latest systems and tablet Wi-Fi. The library is digitized with a good collection of reference and research books.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure; everything is noticed very quickly. No ragging, good infrastructure, classrooms, and library are sufficient. The canteen is small, like a small shop, but medical facilities are available. Sports and games are encouraged more. Many students were selected for state and national level sports competitions.

reviews.review_heading: College life is very beautiful.
reviews.review_text: It's very nice about the infrastructure of our college. Classrooms, labs, library, and Wi-Fi are also very good and more peaceful. All are very good about Methodist College of Engineering & Technology. It is a very good college and it's very nice to say about our college.

reviews.review_heading: About E-waste resource engineering and management.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. No Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are good. Library is too disgusting. I think there is no hostel at our college. All my friends come from other private hostels. No Wi-Fi on the campus, and they are also not good at all. We don't know the passwords for the Wi-Fi and no good network for them. We should have to bring the things to play, no games. Canteen is good. Food facility is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Genuine review of Methodist College of Engineering & Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best facilities like Wi-Fi, digital class, computer labs, core laboratories, and best practical equipment to learn the application of technologies. The college provides a hostel but there are private hostels nearby. The college has a canteen, indoor sports and so on.

reviews.review_heading: Only dissatisfied with events, extra-curricular activities, and placements are somewhat satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are not bad. Coming to the infrastructure, its normal not like other colleges. There is no college hostel. There is a small canteen, only chip, puff, icecream, and drinks are available. We have less parking area. Sports and games are not bad.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Methodist College of Engineering & Technology.
reviews.review_text: There are all the facilities in this course like laboratories, library, placement cell, digital classrooms, AC, etc. In my department laboratories are equipped with branded machines. We don't have a hostel but can join private hostel or rooms. The college has a canteen. There will be mandatory sports hours for students every week.

reviews.review_heading: I am pretty satisfied with this college
reviews.review_text: In the classroom, there is a projector, and we have many labs and a pretty big library, including the digital one. My hostel is not related to the college. It's a private one. I pay 4,800 per month for it. The food quality is average, and hot water is available anytime.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good teachers, good food and a good hostel.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good and the food is also good. Facilities and the infrastructure available for our course and the department are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with teachers, infrastructure is well-maintained, and all the facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Digital boards, Wi-Fi, etc., are available. Classrooms are spacious and the library is also vast. Facilities are good and the food taste is also better. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are also available. All the facilities are maintained in a good manner.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good. College provides Wi-Fi, labs, computer halls, classrooms, and library. Hostels area is clean and neat. Food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities, sports and games facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for studies and they teach very well.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good in our college. There is no problem with the facilities in the hostel. It provides homely food and the quality is excellent. The accommodation is also good to stay. Other facilities like cultural activities are available but we do not have games in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Methodist College of Engineering & Technology.
reviews.review_text: This college has well-maintained computer labs with fast internet access and a central library with a variety of books and a digital library. The college has a cafeteria, which is a refreshment area for the students and the faculty members in their hectic situations. It has a lush green area.

The TG ICET 2026 registration process has started for admission to MBA and MCA courses. Students will be able to register themselves till Mar 16, 2026, without a late fee. The exam will be conducted on May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Below are a few more updates related to the St. Mary's Group of Institutions:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students looking for better jobs
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Active but run mostly by students

fees_and_eligibility.overview: St. Mary's Group of Institutions offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech and B.Pharma. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. St. Mary's Group of Institutions fee structure ranges between INR 44,700 to 2,40,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by St. Mary's Group of Institutions are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at St. Mary's Group of Institutions goes up to 3985.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at St. Mary's Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer:
A:    St. Mary's Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination.

Candidate  must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject.

Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognized as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.

Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.B.PharmaCandidates must have completed 16 years of Age by the date of commencement of Admissions or on such other date as may be notified by the CET Committee. There is no upper age limit.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is really satisfied with faculty members and fee structure.

review_content.Placements: More than 30 companies are offered in college. The highest package is 13 LPA. Above 40% of students are placed on campus placements. The faculty also fully helps us with placements. In this college, the management has already trained the students for placements. We can get jobs easily but the package is less.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice. More than 10 buildings are there. Mess quality is neat and good. Hostel has a homely feel. High security is there in college and has a gym. There is a swimming pool for the campus hostel students and it is always clean and neat. Many workers are there, if any problem is there solve it fastly.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I'm dissatisfied with teaching techniques and very low placement records.

review_content.Placements: With all my experience and senior students' advice, only about 10% of outgoing students are able to secure jobs with a CTC ranging from 2.5 LPA being the least and 10 LPA the highest, till the recent pass-out batch of B.Tech graduates. Dell, Deloitte, HP, TCS, Zomato, Accenture, IBM, and some startup companies are the top recruiters of our college. Many students have only a choice to work in BPO or telecaller customer service jobs. There are no internships at all. Only Computer Science courses, with AI, ML, and CS are provided in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department has no Wi-Fi for students and even labs with minimum equipment with the majority of them are not properly under working conditions. No Wi-Fi connection is available for computer system in any computer labs. Only 80% of class strength can be accommodated in any lab, and library with no proper books or materials available. The quality of hostel food is average. No encouragement for the 1st and 2nd year students in sports activities. I've not seen any sick room or first aid room not even any medicine for students with sickness they just tell to go hospital.

review_summary.college_name: St. Mary's Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with many placement offers and a good atmosphere.

content.Placements: This is a good college with good placement offers. I complete all my subjects every semester with no backlogs. In the final year, we have to give projects, and we receive placement offers. A high percentage of students pass out, and the highest package is provided through placement offers. Internships are also provided.
content.Infrastructure: For my B.Tech AIML course, the college provides a hostel with long rooms and delicious food. The facilities and infrastructure available for my course and department include a computer lab, Wi-Fi, a library, quality food from the canteen, sports, games, and medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I'm dissatisfied because of our faculty members and good placements.

content.Placements: The highest percentage got placed from our branch. The highest package is 4.5 LPA and the lowest percentage is 3.5 LPA. Top companies are Wipro, TCS, Mahindra, Accenture, Genpact, and BS Envitech company. Roles offered are assistant manager, employee, and in IT field. The highest percentage in OU branch is state 3rd and 4th.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel accommodation is neat and clean. The rooms are awesome, with 24/7 CCTV monitored. The food is nice and tasty, with different items provided. The hostel wardens are good in manner. Our hostel provides Wi-Fi, labs, and a library. The mess and canteen provide different types of meals. Games are conducted two times a year, which is helpful for students. Sports and cultural activities are also conducted.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is really satisfied with faculty members and fee structure.

content.Placements: More than 30 companies are offered in college. The highest package is 13 LPA. Above 40% of students are placed on campus placements. The faculty also fully helps us with placements. In this college, the management has already trained the students for placements. We can get jobs easily but the package is less.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice. More than 10 buildings are there. Mess quality is neat and good. Hostel has a homely feel. High security is there in college and has a gym. There is a swimming pool for the campus hostel students and it is always clean and neat. Many workers are there, if any problem is there solve it fastly.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I'm dissatisfied with teaching techniques and very low placement records.

content.Placements: With all my experience and senior students' advice, only about 10% of outgoing students are able to secure jobs with a CTC ranging from 2.5 LPA being the least and 10 LPA the highest, till the recent pass-out batch of B.Tech graduates. Dell, Deloitte, HP, TCS, Zomato, Accenture, IBM, and some startup companies are the top recruiters of our college. Many students have only a choice to work in BPO or telecaller customer service jobs. There are no internships at all. Only Computer Science courses, with AI, ML, and CS are provided in this college.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has no Wi-Fi for students and even labs with minimum equipment with the majority of them are not properly under working conditions. No Wi-Fi connection is available for computer system in any computer labs. Only 80% of class strength can be accommodated in any lab, and library with no proper books or materials available. The quality of hostel food is average. No encouragement for the 1st and 2nd year students in sports activities. I've not seen any sick room or first aid room not even any medicine for students with sickness they just tell to go hospital.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college environment and infrastructure are good.

content.Placements: There are average placements in our college. TCS, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and others. Software engineering, web developer, designer, call center, etc., roles are provided. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA. The highest package is 12 LPA. 20 people got internships from our college.
content.Infrastructure: The course provides important content and other activities. Classrooms are very clean. Labs and other things are also so good. The mess provides the required food, good water, and others. Sports are provided in holidays.

paragraphs: St. Mary's Group of Institutions admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must appear for certain entrance exams to take admission. The college offers a variety of courses to the candidates at the UG, PG and After 10th level in the field of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Design and Animation. Read below for more details on St. Mary's Group of Institutions admission process:

courses_data.description: St. Mary's Group of Institutionsoffers MBA/PGDM for 2 years at the PG level. This course is offered in full time mode. Candidates are offered admission in MBA/PGDM based on their qualifying exam scores. The university offers MBA/PGDM in specialisations such as Digital Marketing, etc. Selected candidates have to pay a total tuition fees ofINR 54,000 - 70,000. The final shortlist for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech programme is determined by the candidates' academic scores.

The hostel wardens are good in manner. Our hostel provides Wi-Fi, labs, and a library. The mess and canteen provide different types of meals. Games are conducted two times a year, which is helpful for students. Sports and cultural activities are also conducted.

reviews.review_heading: It is really satisfied with faculty members and fee structure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice. More than 10 buildings are there. Mess quality is neat and good. Hostel has a homely feel. High security is there in college and has a gym. There is a swimming pool for the campus hostel students and it is always clean and neat. Many workers are there, if any problem is there solve it fastly.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with teaching techniques and very low placement records.
reviews.review_text: Our department has no Wi-Fi for students and even labs with minimum equipment with the majority of them are not properly under working conditions. No Wi-Fi connection is available for computer system in any computer labs. Only 80% of class strength can be accommodated in any lab, and library with no proper books or materials available. The quality of hostel food is average. No encouragement for the 1st and 2nd year students in sports activities. I've not seen any sick room or first aid room not ...

reviews.review_heading: The college environment and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: The course provides important content and other activities. Classrooms are very clean. Labs and other things are also so good. The mess provides the required food, good water, and others. Sports are provided in holidays.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has value for money.
reviews.review_text: Labs are okay, but Wi-Fi is not available in all the labs.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and average placement.
reviews.review_text: There is not sufficient Wi-Fi, and the classrooms are very nice and now modified as digital classes. The library also contains a lot of books, and it is a very huge and peaceful place in the overall campus. Other facilities are available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Perfection, Simplicity, and Discipline.
reviews.review_text: The whole college has its own private Wi-Fi, and every floor has its own Wi-Fi. Many labs are there for practicals and a better understanding for students. The canteen of the college is clean and good, perfect. The college has sports and events perfectly.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and has a good environment, large playground, classrooms, and a large central library. The mess and hostel are average, food is also good. College conducts sports games and cultural events, and medical facilities are available, with a separate room for it.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for studies as it has the best faculty and is great at maintaining discipline.
reviews.review_text:
Hostel facilities around the college have lots of pg hoises separate for boys and girls. 
Disciplines are maintained, and rules are followed. 
Food and cleanliness are maintained. 
Ac rooms are also available, though slightly pricey.
Three or four beds are present in each room, with proper neatness maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Real-life review to help you choose a college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, but the downside is they haven’t repainted the buildings in 7 years, making them look dull. The library is huge and good enough to meet students' needs. The labs are okay, but some classrooms have broken boards and benches, which is unacceptable.

reviews.review_heading: The topmost college for emerging technologies.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in our college include clean bathrooms, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of food in our hostel, mess, and canteen is available on time. Medical facilities, sports, and games are organized in March and April.

reviews.review_heading: My campus life in St. Mary .
reviews.review_text: My college atmosphere is very cool. It has huge acres of land and lab facilities like a computer lab, a chemical lab, and industrial labs. The hostel has different rooms for both girls and boys, good food and a hygienic mess hall for the students .

reviews.review_heading: Torchbearers are made at St. Mary's College.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure available for our course was good. Facilities are better; labs and classrooms are available for students. Morning tiffin to night dinner food was nice. The college provides good facilities for students. Canteens are very helpful to students. On Sunday, we spend time on the ground playing games.

reviews.review_heading: The best life-changing college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities we have are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library for each and every department. The quality of the facility in our hostel is good, and the cleanliness of the canteen and mess will be a lot different. The medical kit will be available 24 hours a day.

likes.text: Our college provides placements in different companies like Tech Mahindra, Genpact, Cognizant, BSNL, ECIL, Wipro etc.
Some of our seniors got placed, and if you work hard on your skills and learn some special courses, then you will get a job in placements.
